This architecture is applied to three distinct rehabilitation modalities: Passive, Active-Assisted, and Active-Resistive, by dynamically linking the exercise's execution phase to the patient's tangential force contribution. To guarantee safety, a Gaussian Mixture Regression (GMR) model is learned on-the-fly from the patient's own limb. This allows the detection of abnormal interaction forces and, if necessary, reverses the trajectory to prevent injury. Experimental validation demonstrates the system's precision, achieving an average trajectory reproduction error of 3.7cm and a range of motion (ROM) error of 5.5 degrees. Furthermore, dynamic interaction trials confirm that the controller successfully enforces effort-based progression while maintaining strict spatial path adherence against human disturbances.

</details>


### [636] [Towards Equitable Robotic Furnishing Agents for Aging-in-Place: ADL-Grounded Design Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14182)
*Hansoo Lee,Changhee Seo,Subin Park,Sonya S. Kwak*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向老年人居家养老的机器人家具代理概念，强调以公平、正义和责任为核心，通过结合计算机视觉、生成式AI和大语言模型，实现自然语言交互、情境感知提醒、安全执行和用户中心的透明性，并基于真实老年用户访谈验证了其需求与偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在居家养老场景中，老年人日常活动中的小困难会累积，影响其健康、自主性和安全性；现有机器人系统多聚焦于便利性功能，缺乏对公平性、正义性和责任的重视。

Method: 通过面向日常生活活动（ADL）的半结构化访谈（4位70–80岁老年人），识别高频挑战并提炼设计需求；据此提出‘机器人家具代理’概念，并融合计算机视觉、生成式AI与LLM实现多模态交互与安全执行；再通过视频刺激式回访验证用户偏好与公平性关切。

Result: 识别出三大典型ADL挑战（物品查找/整理、服药管理、物体搬运）；提炼出关键设计需求（如执行前确认、可调自主性与速度、多模态反馈）；发现用户对公平性（如算法偏见、数字鸿沟）的深层担忧。

Conclusion: 机器人辅助系统必须超越便利性，将公平、正义与责任嵌入设计与部署全过程；需进一步探索真实家庭环境中可评估、可落地的公平型福祉机器人系统。

Abstract: In aging-in-place contexts, small difficulties in Activities of Daily Living (ADL) can accumulate, affecting well-being through fatigue, anxiety, reduced autonomy, and safety risks. This position paper argues that robotics for older adult wellbeing must move beyond "convenience features" and centre equity, justice, and responsibility. We conducted ADL-grounded semi-structured interviews with four adults in their 70s-80s, identifying recurrent challenges (finding/ organising items, taking medication, and transporting objects) and deriving requirements to reduce compounded cognitive-physical burden. Based on these insights, we propose an in-home robotic furnishing-agent concept leveraging computer vision and generative AI and LLMs for natural-language interaction, context-aware reminders, safe actuation, and user-centred transparency. We then report video-stimulated follow-up interviews with the same participants, highlighting preferences for confirmation before actuation, predictability, adjustable speed/autonomy, and multimodal feedback, as well as equity-related concerns. We conclude with open questions on evaluating and deploying equitable robotic wellbeing systems in real homes.

</details>


### [637] [Navigation beyond Wayfinding: Robots Collaborating with Visually Impaired Users for Environmental Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14216)
*Shaojun Cai,Nuwan Janaka,Ashwin Ram,Janidu Shehan,Yingjia Wan,Kotaro Hara,David Hsu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种人机协作的导盲机器人系统，通过‘引导模式’和‘自适应模式’交替工作，支持视障用户与环境进行物理交互（如按电梯按钮、开门），显著提升了导航的安全性、流畅性和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有导盲机器人系统大多假设路径畅通，缺乏对需要操作物体以实现移动的环境交互的支持，而这类交互对视障用户导航至关重要。

Method: 设计一种协作式人-机器人导航系统，结合机器人精准感知定位能力与用户物理操作能力，采用双模式切换机制：引导模式（机器人探测并引导用户至目标）与适应模式（机器人根据用户交互行为实时调整运动）。

Result: 实验表明，该系统在安全性、流畅性和效率上均优于传统白手杖和非自适应导引系统，且在高精度定位任务中优势更明显。

Conclusion: 人机协作是提升辅助技术通用性与现实适用性的有效途径，尤其适用于复杂环境中的动态交互导航任务。

Abstract: Robotic guidance systems have shown promise in supporting blind and visually impaired (BVI) individuals with wayfinding and obstacle avoidance. However, most existing systems assume a clear path and do not support a critical aspect of navigation - environmental interactions that require manipulating objects to enable movement. These interactions are challenging for a human-robot pair because they demand (i) precise localization and manipulation of interaction targets (e.g., pressing elevator buttons) and (ii) dynamic coordination between the user's and robot's movements (e.g., pulling out a chair to sit). We present a collaborative human-robot approach that combines our robotic guide dog's precise sensing and localization capabilities with the user's ability to perform physical manipulation. The system alternates between two modes: lead mode, where the robot detects and guides the user to the target, and adaptation mode, where the robot adjusts its motion as the user interacts with the environment (e.g., opening a door). Evaluation results show that our system enables navigation that is safer, smoother, and more efficient than both a traditional white cane and a non-adaptive guiding system, with the performance gap widening as tasks demand higher precision in locating interaction targets. These findings highlight the promise of human-robot collaboration in advancing assistive technologies toward more generalizable and realistic navigation support.

</details>


### [638] [A Real-Time Neuro-Symbolic Ethical Governor for Safe Decision Control in Autonomous Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14221)
*Aueaphum Aueawatthanaphisut,Kuepon Aueawatthanaphisut*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种实时神经符号伦理监管器，结合Transformer伦理推理、概率伦理风险场与阈值覆盖控制机制，实现机器人操作中的风险感知监督控制；通过微调DistilBERT模型从自然语言任务描述中学习伦理意图，并构建连续伦理风险度量，实验证明其在保障安全的同时不显著牺牲任务效率，且具备更强可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主机器人系统在以人为中心和安全敏感环境中运行时，亟需伦理决策治理能力，以确保行为符合伦理规范并保障人类安全。

Method: 提出一种实时神经符号伦理监管框架，融合基于Transformer的伦理推理、概率伦理风险场建模及阈值驱动的覆盖控制机制；利用微调DistilBERT（基于ETHICS数据集）实现语言接地的伦理意图推断，并综合预测的不安全动作概率、置信不确定性与概率方差生成连续伦理风险指标。

Result: 在模拟机器人臂任务中验证了方法有效性：模型收敛稳定、伦理风险判别可靠、安全感知决策提升，且任务执行效率未显著下降；相比纯数据驱动方法，该架构具有更高可解释性。

Conclusion: 伦理决策治理可被建模为自主机器人系统的动态监督风险层，该神经符号架构为安全关键型人机共融场景提供了可解释、实时、风险感知的伦理控制新范式，具有向更广义网络物理系统和辅助机器人领域拓展的潜力。

Abstract: Ethical decision governance has become a critical requirement for autonomous robotic systems operating in human-centered and safety-sensitive environments. This paper presents a real-time neuro-symbolic ethical governor designed to enable risk-aware supervisory control in autonomous robotic manipulation tasks. The proposed framework integrates transformer-based ethical reasoning with a probabilistic ethical risk field formulation and a threshold-based override control mechanism. language-grounded ethical intent inference capability is learned from natural language task descriptions using a fine-tuned DistilBERT model trained on the ETHICS commonsense dataset. A continuous ethical risk metric is subsequently derived from predicted unsafe action probability, confidence uncertainty, and probabilistic variance to support adaptive decision filtering. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated through simulated autonomous robot-arm task scenarios involving varying levels of human proximity and operational hazard. Experimental results demonstrate stable model convergence, reliable ethical risk discrimination, and improved safety-aware decision outcomes without significant degradation of task execution efficiency. The proposed neuro-symbolic architecture further provides enhanced interpretability compared with purely data-driven safety filters, enabling transparent ethical reasoning in real-time control loops. The findings suggest that ethical decision governance can be effectively modeled as a dynamic supervisory risk layer for autonomous robotic systems, with potential applicability to broader cyber-physical and assistive robotics domains.

</details>


### [639] [AeroGen: Agentic Drone Autonomy through Single-Shot Structured Prompting & Drone SDK](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14236)
*Kautuk Astu,Yogesh Simmhan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AeroGen is a framework that uses structured guardrail prompting with the AeroDaaS SDK to enable LLMs to reliably generate correct, constraint-aware drone control programs in a single shot.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Designing correct UAV autonomy programs is challenging due to complex navigation, sensing, and analytics requirements; LLMs lack reliability for safety-critical UAV applications.

Method: AeroGen employs open-loop structured guardrail prompting—embedding API descriptions, flight constraints, and world rules into the LLM’s context—and integrates tightly with the AeroDaaS drone SDK, requiring minimal example code.

Result: AeroGen successfully generates ~40-line Python drone programs in ~20 seconds per mission across 20 navigation tasks and 5 real-world/simulation missions (urban, farm, inspection), supporting both imperative and declarative prompts.

Conclusion: Structured prompting combined with a well-defined SDK significantly improves correctness, robustness, and deployability of LLM-generated UAV autonomy code.

Abstract: Designing correct UAV autonomy programs is challenging due to joint navigation, sensing and analytics requirements. While LLMs can generate code, their reliability for safety-critical UAVs remains uncertain. This paper presents AeroGen, an open-loop framework that enables consistently correct single-shot AI-generated drone control programs through structured guardrail prompting and integration with the AeroDaaS drone SDK. AeroGen encodes API descriptions, flight constraints and operational world rules directly into the system context prompt, enabling generic LLMs to produce constraint-aware code from user prompts, with minimal example code. We evaluate AeroGen across a diverse benchmark of 20 navigation tasks and 5 drone missions on urban, farm and inspection environments, using both imperative and declarative user prompts. AeroGen generates about 40 lines of AeroDaaS Python code in about 20s per mission, in both real-world and simulations, showing that structured prompting with a well-defined SDK improves robustness, correctness and deployability of LLM-generated drone autonomy programs.

</details>


### [640] [Design of a Bio-Inspired Miniature Submarine for Low-Cost Water Quality Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14244)
*Quang Huy Vu,Quan Le,Manh Duong Phung*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受乌贼喷射推进启发的低成本微型水下航行器，用于水质监测，具备推进、转向、深度调节与水样采集功能，硬件成本约122.5美元，并在池塘与湖泊中验证了其稳定性与实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水质量监测对保护水生生态系统和检测环境污染至关重要，但现有方案常成本高、体积大，难以普及应用于教育和小规模环境监测。

Method: 设计并实现一种仿生微型潜艇：采用泵驱动水流实现喷射推进与转向，结合泵控浮力系统实现深度调节与水样采集；集成ESP32、IMU、压力传感器、GPS和LoRa等低成本商用模块；通过池测与湖试开展运动控制与采样性能验证。

Result: 旋转测试中横滚/俯仰偏差分别控制在±2°与±1.5°内；航向阶跃响应上升时间约2秒、调节时间约5秒；深度控制稳态误差在±0.1米内；实地试验成功完成导航与水样采集。

Conclusion: 该平台具有结构紧凑、姿态稳定、成本低廉等特点，为小规模水环境监测提供了一种可行、可扩展的实用解决方案。

Abstract: Water quality monitoring is essential for protecting aquatic ecosystems and detecting environmental pollution. This paper presents the design and experimental validation of a bio-inspired miniature submarine for low-cost water quality monitoring. Inspired by the jet propulsion mechanism of squids, the proposed system employs pump-driven water jets for propulsion and steering, combined with a pump-based buoyancy control mechanism that enables both depth regulation and water sampling. The vehicle integrates low-cost, commercially available components including an ESP32 microcontroller, IMU, pressure sensor, GPS receiver, and LoRa communication module. The complete system can be constructed at a hardware cost of approximately $122.5, making it suitable for educational and environmental monitoring applications. Experimental validation was conducted through pool tests and field trials in a lake. During a 360 degrees rotation test, roll and pitch deviations remained within +/-2 degrees and +/-1.5 degrees, respectively, demonstrating stable attitude control. Steering experiments showed a heading step response with approximately 2 s rise time and 5 s settling time. Depth control experiments achieved a target depth of 2.5 m with steady-state error within +/-0.1 m. Field experiments further demonstrated reliable navigation and successful water sampling operations. The results confirm that the proposed platform provides a compact, stable, and cost-effective solution for small-scale aquatic environmental monitoring.

</details>


### [641] [Load-Aware Locomotion Control for Humanoid Robots in Industrial Transportation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14308)
*Lequn Fu,Yijun Zhong,Xiao Li,Yibin Liu,Zhiyuan Xu,Jian Tang,Shiqi Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向工业场景人形机器人的负载感知步态控制框架，通过解耦但协同的运动-操作架构，在仿真中训练后可直接部署于真实机器人，无需微调，实现了在负载和上肢操作变化下的稳定、鲁棒运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业环境中的人形机器人需执行负载搬运任务，但变负载与上肢运动带来的动力学耦合和状态部分可观测性使得稳定鲁棒的步态控制极具挑战。

Method: 采用解耦又协同的运动-操作架构：下肢步态由强化学习策略控制，输出对运动学生成的名义构型的残差关节动作；引入高度条件化的关节空间偏移作为运动参考，并利用基于历史的状态估计器推断基座线速度与高度，同时将负载与操作引起的扰动编码为紧凑隐变量。整个框架纯仿真训练。

Result: 仿真与真实实验表明该方法训练更快、高度跟踪更准、运动-操作更稳定；且模型可直接部署于全尺寸人形机器人，无需任何真实环境微调。

Conclusion: 所提出的负载感知步态框架有效缓解了动态耦合与部分可观测性问题，提升了工业人形机器人在复杂负载条件下的运动鲁棒性与实用性。

Abstract: Humanoid robots deployed in industrial environments are required to perform load-carrying transportation tasks that tightly couple locomotion and manipulation. However, achieving stable and robust locomotion under varying payloads and upper-body motions is challenging due to dynamic coupling and partial observability. This paper presents a load-aware locomotion framework for industrial humanoids based on a decoupled yet coordinated loco-manipulation architecture. Lower-body locomotion is controlled via a reinforcement learning policy producing residual joint actions on kinematically derived nominal configurations. A kinematics-based locomotion reference with a height-conditioned joint-space offset guides learning, while a history-based state estimator infers base linear velocity and height and encodes residual load- and manipulation-induced disturbances in a compact latent representation. The framework is trained entirely in simulation and deployed on a full-size humanoid robot without fine-tuning. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate faster training, accurate height tracking, and stable loco-manipulation. Project page: https://lequn-f.github.io/LALO/

</details>


### [642] [OmniClone: Engineering a Robust, All-Rounder Whole-Body Humanoid Teleoperation System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14327)
*Yixuan Li,Le Ma,Yutang Lin,Yushi Du,Mengya Liu,Kaizhe Hu,Jieming Cui,Yixin Zhu,Wei Liang,Baoxiong Jia,Siyuan Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了OmniClone，一种高保真、多技能的全身人形机器人遥操作系统，可在单个消费级GPU上运行，并通过诊断基准OmniBench揭示并改进现有系统的局限性，显著降低关节位置误差且资源需求大幅减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遥操作系统评估方式粗粒度、系统配置耦合度高且部署成本高，缺乏兼顾鲁棒性、通用性与经济性的实用方案。

Method: 提出诊断性基准OmniBench，按运动类别与难度分层评估；据此优化训练数据策略，并引入受试者无关的动作重定向与鲁棒通信机制；构建控制源无关的统一策略模型。

Result: MPJPE降低超66%，计算资源需求减少数个数量级，支持实时遥操作、动作回放及VLA模型，且泛化适配不同体型操作者。

Conclusion: OmniClone通过诊断驱动与工程优化结合，为可扩展的人形机器人遥操作与自主学习提供了低成本、高适应性的实用基础。

Abstract: Whole-body humanoid teleoperation enables humans to remotely control humanoid robots, serving as both a real-time operational tool and a scalable engine for collecting demonstrations for autonomous learning. Despite recent advances, existing systems are validated using aggregate metrics that conflate distinct motion regimes, masking critical failure modes. This lack of diagnostic granularity, compounded by tightly coupled and labor-intensive system configurations, hinders robust real-world deployment. A key open challenge is building a teleoperation system that is simultaneously robust, versatile, and affordable for practical use. Here we present OmniClone, a whole-body humanoid teleoperation system that achieves high-fidelity, multi-skill control on a single consumer GPU with modest data requirements. Central to our approach is OmniBench, a diagnostic benchmark that evaluates policies across stratified motion categories and difficulty levels on unseen motions, exposing the narrow specialization of prior systems. Guided by these diagnostics, we identify an optimized training data recipe and integrate system-level improvements: subject-agnostic retargeting and robust communication, that collectively reduce Mean Per-Joint Position Error (MPJPE) by over 66% while requiring orders-of-magnitude fewer computational resources than comparable methods. Crucially, OmniClone is control-source-agnostic: a single unified policy supports real-time teleoperation, generated motion playback, and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, while generalizing across operators of vastly different body proportions. By uniting diagnostic evaluation with practical engineering, OmniClone provides an accessible foundation for scalable humanoid teleoperation and autonomous learning.

</details>


### [643] [Data-Driven Physics Embedded Dynamics with Predictive Control and Reinforcement Learning for Quadrupeds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14333)
*Prakrut Kotecha,Aditya Shirwatkar,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）嵌入强化学习模型预测控制（RL-MPC）框架的新方法，提升了动力学建模的物理一致性、长时域稳定性、样本效率与实时规划速度，并在Unitree Go1机器人上验证了实际可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有四足 locomotion 方法在长时域下存在误差累积问题，且因缺乏物理归纳偏置而可解释性差。

Method: 将拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）集成到RL-MPC框架中，并设计一种避免矩阵求逆的逆动力学无限时域MPC方案以提升计算效率。

Result: 相比无结构神经动力学模型，该方法显著提升了样本效率、降低了长时域误差、加快了实时规划速度（最高提速4倍），并在Unitree Go1机器人上完成实机验证。

Conclusion: 引入物理约束的LNN可有效增强RL-MPC框架的稳定性、可解释性与部署效率，为具身智能体的动力学学习与控制提供了新范式。

Abstract: State of the art quadrupedal locomotion approaches integrate Model Predictive Control (MPC) with Reinforcement Learning (RL), enabling complex motion capabilities with planning and terrain adaptive behaviors. However, they often face compounding errors over long horizons and have limited interpretability due to the absence of physical inductive biases. We address these issues by integrating Lagrangian Neural Networks (LNNs) into an RL MPC framework, enabling physically consistent dynamics learning. At deployment, our inverse dynamics infinite horizon MPC scheme avoids costly matrix inversions, improving computational efficiency by up to 4x with minimal loss of task performance. We validate our framework through multiple ablations of the proposed LNN and its variants. We show improved sample efficiency, reduced long-horizon error, and faster real time planning compared to unstructured neural dynamics. Lastly, we also test our framework on the Unitree Go1 robot to show real world viability.

</details>


### [644] [VIP-Loco: A Visually Guided Infinite Horizon Planning Framework for Legged Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14345)
*Aditya Shirwatkar,Satyam Gupta,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出VIP-Loco框架，融合视觉感知、强化学习与模型预测控制，实现腿式机器人在复杂动态环境中的鲁棒、可解释运动控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MPC虽具可解释性和约束处理能力，但难以应对高维感知输入和快速变化地形；纯RL适应性强但缺乏规划能力，需弥合二者鸿沟。

Method: 提出VIP-Loco：训练阶段用内部模型将本体感知状态和深度图像映射为紧凑的动力学特征，供RL策略使用；部署阶段将学习到的模型嵌入无限时域MPC中，结合感知适应性与结构化规划。

Result: 在仿真中验证了VIP-Loco在斜坡、楼梯、爬行、倾斜平台、跨隙、攀爬等挑战任务上的有效性，覆盖三种机器人形态（Go1、Cassie、TronA1-W），并通过消融和SOTA对比证明其统一感知与规划的能力。

Conclusion: VIP-Loco成功融合感知、学习与规划，在多样复杂环境中实现了鲁棒且可解释的腿式机器人运动控制。

Abstract: Perceptive locomotion for legged robots requires anticipating and adapting to complex, dynamic environments. Model Predictive Control (MPC) serves as a strong baseline, providing interpretable motion planning with constraint enforcement, but struggles with high-dimensional perceptual inputs and rapidly changing terrain. In contrast, model-free Reinforcement Learning (RL) adapts well across visually challenging scenarios but lacks planning. To bridge this gap, we propose VIP-Loco, a framework that integrates vision-based scene understanding with RL and planning. During training, an internal model maps proprioceptive states and depth images into compact kinodynamic features used by the RL policy. At deployment, the learned models are used within an infinite-horizon MPC formulation, combining adaptability with structured planning. We validate VIP-Loco in simulation on challenging locomotion tasks, including slopes, stairs, crawling, tilting, gap jumping, and climbing, across three robot morphologies: a quadruped (Unitree Go1), a biped (Cassie), and a wheeled-biped (TronA1-W). Through ablations and comparisons with state-of-the-art methods, we show that VIP-Loco unifies planning and perception, enabling robust, interpretable locomotion in diverse environments.

</details>


### [645] [OxyGen: Unified KV Cache Management for Vision-Language-Action Models under Multi-Task Parallelism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14371)
*Xiangyu Li,Huaizhi Tang,Xin Ding,Weijun Wang,Ting Cao,Yunxin Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一KV缓存管理范式，用于提升多任务并行执行效率，尤其适用于具身AI中的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，显著加速推理并保持性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具身AI需要在共享观测下并行处理多种异构任务（如操作、对话、记忆构建），但现有推理系统因KV缓存孤立管理导致冗余计算和资源争用，难以高效部署。

Method: 提出统一KV缓存管理，将KV缓存作为跨任务、跨时间的一等共享资源；实现跨任务KV共享（减少共享观测的重复prefill）和跨帧连续批处理（解耦变长语言生成与固定频率动作生成）。

Result: 在π₀.₅（主流MoT VLA）上实现OxyGen系统，相较隔离执行最高提速3.7×，同时达成>200 tokens/s语言吞吐与70 Hz动作频率，且动作质量无损。

Conclusion: 统一KV缓存管理是提升具身AI多任务并行推理效率的关键范式，为端侧部署提供了高效、可扩展的基础设施支持。

Abstract: Embodied AI agents increasingly require parallel execution of multiple tasks, such as manipulation, conversation, and memory construction, from shared observations under distinct time constraints. Recent Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) Vision-Language-Action Models (VLAs) architecturally support such heterogeneous outputs, yet existing inference systems fail to achieve efficient multi-task parallelism for on-device deployment due to redundant computation and resource contention. We identify isolated KV cache management as the root cause. To address this, we propose unified KV cache management, an inference paradigm that treats KV cache as a first-class shared resource across tasks and over time. This abstraction enables two key optimizations: cross-task KV sharing eliminates redundant prefill of shared observations, while cross-frame continuous batching decouples variable-length language decoding from fixed-rate action generation across control cycles. We implement this paradigm for $π_{0.5}$, the most popular MoT VLA, and evaluate under representative robotic configurations. OxyGen achieves up to 3.7$\times$ speedup over isolated execution, delivering over 200 tokens/s language throughput and 70 Hz action frequency simultaneously without action quality degradation.

</details>


### [646] [From Scanning Guidelines to Action: A Robotic Ultrasound Agent with LLM-Based Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14393)
*Yuan Bi,Yiping Zhou,Pei Liu,Feng Li,Zhongliang Jiang,Nassir Navab*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的自主机器人超声扫描统一框架，通过LLM代理动态解析临床指南、调用工具并实时调整扫描策略，结合强化学习微调提升推理与工具调用准确性，已在胆囊、脊柱和肾脏等多部位真实机器人扫描中验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人超声系统依赖固定流程和任务专用模型，难以适应多样、决策依赖性强的临床扫描任务；需将人类超声医师的经验与情境判断能力以更灵活、可解释的方式迁移到机器人系统中。

Method: 构建一个LLM-based agent，能从超声扫描手册中检索并推理指南步骤，根据实时图像质量与解剖发现动态规划工具调用（如探头运动、参数调整等）；采用强化学习（RL）微调LLM，优化其推理质量、工具选择及参数化准确性。

Result: 在10份超声指南上的口头执行评估显示RL微调显著提升推理与工具调用性能；在真实机器人平台上成功完成胆囊、脊柱和肾脏的自主扫描，验证了跨解剖目标的泛化性与实用性。

Conclusion: 该框架摆脱了对预设流程的依赖，实现了基于指南理解的自适应、可解释、可泛化的自主超声扫描，为临床机器人系统提供了更灵活、可信的新范式。

Abstract: Robotic ultrasound offers advantages over free-hand scanning, including improved reproducibility and reduced operator dependency. In clinical practice, US acquisition relies heavily on the sonographer's experience and situational judgment. When transferring this process to robotic systems, such expertise is often encoded explicitly through fixed procedures and task-specific models, yielding pipelines that can be difficult to adapt to new scanning tasks. In this work, we propose a unified framework for autonomous robotic US scanning that leverages a LLM-based agent to interpret US scanning guidelines and execute scans by dynamically invoking a set of provided software tools. Instead of encoding fixed scanning procedures, the LLM agent retrieves and reasons over guideline steps from scanning handbooks and adapts its planning decisions based on observations and the current scanning state. This enables the system to handle variable and decision-dependent workflows, such as adjusting scanning strategies, repeating steps, or selecting the appropriate next tool call in response to image quality or anatomical findings. Because the reasoning underlying tool selection is also critical for transparent and trustworthy planning, we further fine tune the LLM agent using a RL based strategy to improve both its reasoning quality and the correctness of tool selection and parameterization, while maintaining robust generalization to unseen guidelines and related tasks. We first validate the approach via verbal execution on 10 US scanning guidelines, assessing reasoning as well as tool selection and parameterization, and showing the benefit of RL fine tuning. We then demonstrate real world feasibility on robotic scanning of the gallbladder, spine, and kidney. Overall, the framework follows diverse guidelines and enables reliable autonomous scanning across multiple anatomical targets within a unified system.

</details>


### [647] [eNavi: Event-based Imitation Policies for Low-Light Indoor Mobile Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14397)
*Prithvi Jai Ramesh,Kaustav Chanda,Krishna Vinod,Joseph Raj Vishal,Yezhou Yang,Bharatesh Chakravarthi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于RGB与事件相机融合的室内机器人跟随人的端到端导航策略，构建了首个同步多模态真实场景数据集（含事件流、RGB帧与专家动作），并设计了时间对齐预处理流程与Transformer融合架构，在低光等挑战性条件下显著优于单模态方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有事件相机感知研究多集中于检测、SLAM等任务，缺乏充分利用其异步特性的端到端控制策略；同时缺少高质量、同步的多模态真实世界导航数据集。

Method: 构建TurtleBot 2采集的真实室内person-following数据集（含事件流、RGB帧、专家动作及里程计）；设计多模态时间对齐与动作重建预处理流程；提出Late-fusion RGB-Event导航策略，采用双MobileNet编码器+Transformer融合模块，通过行为克隆训练。

Result: 在12种训练设定下系统评估表明：融合模型相较RGB-only和Event-only模型动作预测误差更低、鲁棒性更强，尤其在未见过的低光场景中表现突出；RGB-only模型在此类场景下失效。

Conclusion: 事件数据对提升端到端导航策略在动态、低光等挑战条件下的性能至关重要；多模态融合（特别是Late-fusion+Transformer）是有效利用事件异步特性的可行路径；所发布数据集与代码为后续研究提供了重要基础。

Abstract: Event cameras provide high dynamic range and microsecond-level temporal resolution, making them well-suited for indoor robot navigation, where conventional RGB cameras degrade under fast motion or low-light conditions. Despite advances in event-based perception spanning detection, SLAM, and pose estimation, there remains limited research on end-to-end control policies that exploit the asynchronous nature of event streams. To address this gap, we introduce a real-world indoor person-following dataset collected using a TurtleBot 2 robot, featuring synchronized raw event streams, RGB frames, and expert control actions across multiple indoor maps, trajectories under both normal and low-light conditions. We further build a multimodal data preprocessing pipeline that temporally aligns event and RGB observations while reconstructing ground-truth actions from odometry to support high-quality imitation learning. Building on this dataset, we propose a late-fusion RGB-Event navigation policy that combines dual MobileNet encoders with a transformer-based fusion module trained via behavioral cloning. A systematic evaluation of RGB-only, Event-only, and RGB-Event fusion models across 12 training variations ranging from single-path imitation to general multi-path imitation shows that policies incorporating event data, particularly the fusion model, achieve improved robustness and lower action prediction error, especially in unseen low-light conditions where RGB-only models fail. We release the dataset, synchronization pipeline, and trained models at https://eventbasedvision.github.io/eNavi/

</details>


### [648] [OCRA: Object-Centric Learning with 3D and Tactile Priors for Human-to-Robot Action Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14401)
*Kuanning Wang,Ke Fan,Yuqian Fu,Siyu Lin,Hu Luo,Daniel Seita,Yanwei Fu,Yu-Gang Jiang,Xiangyang Xue*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OCRA是一个面向对象的视频驱动人机动作迁移框架，通过多视角RGB视频、3D基础模型VGGT、检测分割模型及大规模触觉图像数据，构建对象中心的3D点云与触觉先验，并融合于ResFiLM模块和扩散策略中，实现鲁棒的机器人操作学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以从纯视频演示中提取任务相关对象及其交互，且忽略触觉等非视觉模态信息，导致机器人操作泛化性与鲁棒性不足。

Method: OCRA结合多视图RGB视频、VGGT 3D基础模型、先进检测分割模型重建对象中心3D点云；引入百万级触觉图像构建触觉先验；通过ResFiLM多模态融合模块整合3D与触觉信息，并输入Diffusion Policy生成操作动作。

Result: 在视觉独占与视触融合任务上，OCRA显著优于现有基线与消融模型，验证了其从人类演示视频中高效学习的能力。

Conclusion: OCRA证明了对象中心建模与多模态（视觉+触觉）先验融合对提升机器人从视频演示中学习操作技能的有效性与可扩展性。

Abstract: We present OCRA, an Object-Centric framework for video-based human-to-Robot Action transfer that learns directly from human demonstration videos to enable robust manipulation. Object-centric learning emphasizes task-relevant objects and their interactions while filtering out irrelevant background, providing a natural and scalable way to teach robots. OCRA leverages multi-view RGB videos, the state-of-the-art 3D foundation model VGGT, and advanced detection and segmentation models to reconstruct object-centric 3D point clouds, capturing rich interactions between objects. To handle properties not easily perceived by vision alone, we incorporate tactile priors via a large-scale dataset of over one million tactile images. These 3D and tactile priors are fused through a multimodal module (ResFiLM) and fed into a Diffusion Policy to generate robust manipulation actions. Extensive experiments on both vision-only and visuo-tactile tasks show that OCRA significantly outperforms existing baselines and ablations, demonstrating its effectiveness for learning from human demonstration videos.

</details>


### [649] [Towards Versatile Opti-Acoustic Sensor Fusion and Volumetric Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14457)
*Ivana Collado-Gonzalez,John McConnell,Brendan Englot*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合双目声呐与单目相机的体素映射框架，通过解决声呐高程模糊性并结合置信度加权的高斯过程体素映射，在不同能见度水下环境中实现高精度、鲁棒的3D地图构建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下自主航行器在障碍物密集环境中需要高精度3D体素地图，但视觉感知在浑浊水中失效，而声呐虽鲁棒但分辨率低且存在高程模糊性。

Method: 利用重叠视场的双目声呐消除高程模糊，生成每帧完整3D点云；在相机图像中识别兴趣区域，并与对应声呐回波关联，融合声呐距离与相机推导的高程信息生成额外3D点；为每个点分配可靠性置信度，并采用置信度加权的高斯过程体素映射进行融合。

Result: 实验表明该方法在清澈与浑浊条件下均能有效重建复杂几何结构，优于其他光学-声学及纯声呐方法，并在码头真实环境中验证了其导航适用性。

Conclusion: 所提融合框架显著提升了水下环境建图的精度与鲁棒性，开源代码促进社区应用。

Abstract: Accurate 3D volumetric mapping is critical for autonomous underwater vehicles operating in obstacle-rich environments. Vision-based perception provides high-resolution data but fails in turbid conditions, while sonar is robust to lighting and turbidity but suffers from low resolution and elevation ambiguity. This paper presents a volumetric mapping framework that fuses a stereo sonar pair with a monocular camera to enable safe navigation under varying visibility conditions. Overlapping sonar fields of view resolve elevation ambiguity, producing fully defined 3D point clouds at each time step. The framework identifies regions of interest in camera images, associates them with corresponding sonar returns, and combines sonar range with camera-derived elevation cues to generate additional 3D points. Each 3D point is assigned a confidence value reflecting its reliability. These confidence-weighted points are fused using a Gaussian Process Volumetric Mapping framework that prioritizes the most reliable measurements. Experimental comparisons with other opti-acoustic and sonar-based approaches, along with field tests in a marina environment, demonstrate the method's effectiveness in capturing complex geometries and preserving critical information for robot navigation in both clear and turbid conditions. Our code is open-source to support community adoption.

</details>


### [650] [Physics-Informed Policy Optimization via Analytic Dynamics Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14469)
*Namai Chandra,Liu Mohan,Zhihao Gu,Lin Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为PIPER的物理信息强化学习框架，通过在策略优化目标中引入可微拉格朗日残差作为正则项，将物理约束以软约束形式融入神经策略训练，在不修改仿真器或核心RL算法的前提下，显著提升学习效率、稳定性和控制精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于神经网络的强化学习策略在机器人控制中样本效率低且动作物理不一致，而仿真器中已有精确动力学模型未被有效利用。

Method: 提出PIPER框架，将可微分的拉格朗日残差作为正则项嵌入Actor的目标函数，实现解析式软物理约束；该方法仅需在策略优化中增加一个损失项，无需改动仿真器或RL算法架构。

Result: 实验表明该方法显著提升了学习效率、训练稳定性与控制精度。

Conclusion: PIPER为高效、物理一致的机器人控制提供了新范式，实现了物理先验与数据驱动学习的无缝融合。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved strong performance in robotic control; however, state-of-the-art policy learning methods, such as actor-critic methods, still suffer from high sample complexity and often produce physically inconsistent actions. This limitation stems from neural policies implicitly rediscovering complex physics from data alone, despite accurate dynamics models being readily available in simulators. In this paper, we introduce a novel physics-informed RL framework, called PIPER, that seamlessly integrates physical constraints directly into neural policy optimization with analytical soft physics constraints. At the core of our method is the integration of a differentiable Lagrangian residual as a regularization term within the actor's objective. This residual, extracted from a robot's simulator description, subtly biases policy updates towards dynamically consistent solutions. Crucially, this physics integration is realized through an additional loss term during policy optimization, requiring no alterations to existing simulators or core RL algorithms. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves learning efficiency, stability, and control accuracy, establishing a new paradigm for efficient and physically consistent robotic control.

</details>


### [651] [R3DP: Real-Time 3D-Aware Policy for Embodied Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14498)
*Yuhao Zhang,Wanxi Dong,Yue Shi,Yi Liang,Jingnan Gao,Qiaochu Yang,Yaxing Lyu,Zhixuan Liang,Yibin Liu,Congsheng Xu,Xianda Guo,Wei Sui,Yaohui Jin,Xiaokang Yang,Yanyan Xu,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种实时3D感知策略（R3DP），通过异步快慢协同模块（结合稀疏调用的大型3D模型VGGT与轻量级时序特征预测网络TFPNet）和多视角特征融合器（MVFF），在不牺牲实时性的前提下有效利用大规模3D先验知识，显著提升操作任务成功率并降低推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大规模3D视觉模型虽具强先验，但计算开销大、难以满足实时操控需求；亟需一种兼顾精度与效率的3D感知策略架构。

Method: 提出R3DP框架，核心包括：1）异步快慢协作模块——稀疏调用预训练慢系统VGGT于关键帧，同时由轻量TFPNet基于历史数据预测中间帧特征；2）多视角特征融合器MVFF——显式融入相机内外参进行跨视角特征聚合。

Result: R3DP在平均成功率上分别比单视图和多视图DP提升32.9%和51.4%，推理时间较朴素DP+VGGT集成减少44.8%。

Conclusion: R3DP实现了大规模3D先验与实时策略执行的有效解耦与协同，是一种即插即用的高效3D感知策略解决方案。

Abstract: Embodied manipulation requires accurate 3D understanding of objects and their spatial relations to plan and execute contact-rich actions. While large-scale 3D vision models provide strong priors, their computational cost incurs prohibitive latency for real-time control. We propose Real-time 3D-aware Policy (R3DP), which integrates powerful 3D priors into manipulation policies without sacrificing real-time performance. A core innovation of R3DP is the asynchronous fast-slow collaboration module, which seamlessly integrates large-scale 3D priors into the policy without compromising real-time performance. The system maintains real-time efficiency by querying the pre-trained slow system (VGGT) only on sparse key frames, while simultaneously employing a lightweight Temporal Feature Prediction Network (TFPNet) to predict features for all intermediate frames. By leveraging historical data to exploit temporal correlations, TFPNet explicitly improves task success rates through consistent feature estimation. Additionally, to enable more effective multi-view fusion, we introduce a Multi-View Feature Fuser (MVFF) that aggregates features across views by explicitly incorporating camera intrinsics and extrinsics. R3DP offers a plug-and-play solution for integrating large models into real-time inference systems. We evaluate R3DP against multiple baselines across different visual configurations. R3DP effectively harnesses large-scale 3D priors to achieve superior results, outperforming single-view and multi-view DP by 32.9% and 51.4% in average success rate, respectively. Furthermore, by decoupling heavy 3D reasoning from policy execution, R3DP achieves a 44.8% reduction in inference time compared to a naive DP+VGGT integration.

</details>


### [652] [One-Policy-Fits-All: Geometry-Aware Action Latents for Cross-Embodiment Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14522)
*Juncheng Mu,Sizhe Yang,Hojin Bae,Feiyu Jia,Qingwei Ben,Boyi Li,Huazhe Xu,Jiangmiao Pang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出One-Policy-Fits-All (OPFA)框架，通过几何感知的潜在表示（GaLR）和统一潜在重定向解码器，实现跨多种机器人本体（如不同夹爪与灵巧手）的单一策略联合训练，显著提升数据效率与技能迁移性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨本体操作对提升机器人操作可扩展性与降低数据采集成本至关重要，但不同本体在动作空间与结构上的巨大差异阻碍了多源数据联合训练。

Method: 提出OPFA框架：首先利用3D卷积网络与Transformer学习几何感知的潜在表示（GaLR），构建跨本体共享的潜在动作空间；再设计无需本体特化调优的统一潜在重定向解码器，从潜在表示中提取本体特化动作。

Result: 在11种末端执行器上实验表明，跨本体联合训练使成功率提升超50%；仅需8个新本体演示即可达到使用72个演示训练模型的性能水平。

Conclusion: OPFA实现了高效、通用的跨本体策略学习，大幅提升了异构本体数据的利用效率与技能迁移能力。

Abstract: Cross-embodiment manipulation is crucial for enhancing the scalability of robot manipulation and reducing the high cost of data collection. However, the significant differences between embodiments, such as variations in action spaces and structural disparities, pose challenges for joint training across multiple sources of data. To address this, we propose One-Policy-Fits-All (OPFA), a framework that enables learning a single, versatile policy across multiple embodiments. We first learn a Geometry-Aware Latent Representation (GaLR), which leverages 3D convolution networks and transformers to build a shared latent action space across different embodiments. Then we design a unified latent retargeting decoder that extracts embodiment-specific actions from the latent representations, without any embodiment-specific decoder tuning. OPFA enables end-to-end co-training of data from diverse embodiments, including various grippers and dexterous hands with arbitrary degrees of freedom, significantly improving data efficiency and reducing the cost of skill transfer. We conduct extensive experiments across 11 different end-effectors. The results demonstrate that OPFA significantly improves policy performance in diverse settings by leveraging heterogeneous embodiment data. For instance, cross-embodiment co-training can improve success rates by more than 50% compared to single-source training. Moreover, by adding only a few demonstrations from a new embodiment (e.g., eight), OPFA can achieve performance comparable to that of a well-trained model with 72 demonstrations.

</details>


### [653] [Architecting Autonomy for Safe Microgravity Free-Flyer Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14524)
*Keenan Albee,David C. Sternberg,Alexander Hansson,David Schwartz,Ritwik Majumdar,Oliver Jia-Richards*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向月球门户空间站等轨道前哨站的自由飞行器自主巡检任务的规划与控制自主性架构，将操作员指令和任务约束（如速度限制、指向要求、禁入/必入区）转化为具体的设计决策，并在SmallSatSim仿真环境中实现验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小型自由飞行器可在月球门户等未来轨道前哨站执行关键舱外活动（EVA）服务（如巡检与维修），但其邻近敏感空间站和微重力目标运行，亟需形式化描述其所需自主能力。

Method: 将通用任务需求逐级分解为具体的规划与控制自主架构设计决策；建模考虑速度限制、指向约束、keep-in/keep-out区域等独特约束；引入分层安全机制应对模型不确定性与故障；分析成本函数设计、路径vs.轨迹控制等关键规划问题；在SmallSatSim中实现并验证完整自主框架。

Result: 提出了一个完整的自由飞行器巡检自主性框架，明确了典型输入输出、求解时间与推进剂消耗等系统级指标，并在仿真环境中实现；相比现有研究，首次同时提供了真实可行的系统需求和对应的具体自主设计决策。

Conclusion: 该自主架构可作为未来小卫星在关键航天器附近执行自主巡检任务的通用蓝图，显著提升了任务安全性、可行性与工程落地性。

Abstract: Small free-flying spacecraft can provide vital extravehicular activity (EVA) services like inspection and repair for future orbital outposts like the Lunar Gateway. Operating adjacent to delicate space station and microgravity targets, these spacecraft require formalization to describe the autonomy that a free-flyer inspection mission must provide. This work explores the transformation of general mission requirements for this class of free-flyer into a set of concrete decisions for the planning and control autonomy architectures that will power such missions. Flowing down from operator commands for inspection of important regions and mission time-criticality, a motion planning problem emerges that provides the basis for developing autonomy solutions. Unique constraints are considered such as velocity limitations, pointing, and keep-in/keep-out zones, with mission fallback techniques for providing hierarchical safety guarantees under model uncertainties and failure. Planning considerations such as cost function design and path vs. trajectory control are discussed. The typical inputs and outputs of the planning and control autonomy stack of such a mission are also provided. Notional system requirements such as solve times and propellant use are documented to inform planning and control design. The entire proposed autonomy framework for free-flyer inspection is realized in the SmallSatSim simulation environment, providing a reference example of free-flyer inspection autonomy. The proposed autonomy architecture serves as a blueprint for future implementations of small satellite autonomous inspection in proximity to mission-critical hardware, going beyond the existing literature in terms of both (1) providing realistic system requirements for an autonomous inspection mission and (2) translating these requirements into autonomy design decisions for inspection planning and control.

</details>


### [654] [Bots and Blocks: Presenting a project-based approach for robotics education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14529)
*Tobias Geger,Dominique Briechle,Andreas Rausch*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于项目的教学方法，通过一个跨学期的敏捷项目，让学生在应用计算机科学专业‘数字技术’方向中实践机器人编程（特别是ROS），结合互动式‘学校’教学模式（讲座+练习）和团队协作，以自动化积木拆解为用例，提升理论与实践并重的教学效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统课程偏重理论讲授，缺乏实践环节，导致学生难以适应工业界需求；亟需一种能同时培养理论与实践能力、且具有互动性的教学方法。

Method: 采用项目驱动学习（PBL）框架，嵌入于‘数字技术’应用型本科课程中；包含‘学校’式混合教学（讲座+练习）夯实基础，并以跨学期敏捷团队项目形式开展，使用ROS开发面向硬件机器人的拆解软件生态系统。

Result: 成功实施了以积木自动拆解为用例的机器人编程教学项目，学生在真实机器人平台上完成从基础学习到团队应用开发的全过程，提升了工程实践与协作能力。

Conclusion: 项目驱动、敏捷迭代、理论与实践融合的教学模式可有效提升学生在机器人及现代技术领域的综合能力，适用于应用型工科教育改革。

Abstract: To prepare students for upcoming trends and challenges, it is important to teach them about the helpful and important aspects of modern technologies, such as robotics. However, classic study programs often fail to prepare students for working in the industry because of the lack of practical experience, caused by solely theoretical lecturing. The challenge is to teach both practical and theoretical skills interactively to improve the students' learning. In the scope of the paper, a project-based learning approach is proposed, where students are taught in an agile, semester-spanning project how to work with robots. This project is part of the applied computer science degree study program Digital Technologies. The paper presents the framework as well as an exemplary project featuring the development of a disassembly software ecosystem for hardware robots. In the project, the students are taught the programming of robots with the help of the Robot Operating System (ROS). To ensure the base qualifications, the students are taught in so-called schools, an interactive mix of lectures and exercises. At the beginning of the course, the basics of the technologies are covered, while the students work more and more in their team with the robot on a specific use case. The use case here is to automate the disassembly of build block assemblies.

</details>


### [655] [MorFiC: Fixing Value Miscalibration for Zero-Shot Quadruped Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14554)
*Prakhar Mishra,Amir Hossain Raj,Xuesu Xiao,Dinesh Manocha*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MorFiC是一种强化学习方法，通过形态感知的批评者调制实现跨形态四足机器人的零样本运动策略泛化，无需针对每个机器人单独训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在单一机器人上训练的运动策略难以迁移到具有不同质量分布、运动学、关节限制或执行器约束的其他形态机器人上，导致需要为每个机器人重新训练。

Method: MorFiC提出一种形态感知的批评者调制机制，利用机器人物理与控制参数对共享批评者网络进行条件化，生成形态特定的价值估计；训练时仅使用一个源机器人并结合仿真中的形态随机化。

Result: MorFiC在多个目标机器人（A1、Cheetah、B1）上实现零样本迁移，稳定平均速度和最长稳定运行时间均优于形态条件化PPO基线，速度提升达+16.1%（A1）、约2倍（Cheetah）、约5倍（B1）；同时降低跨形态价值预测误差方差，稳定优势估计；并在Unitree Go1/Go2机器人上实现无需微调的零样本部署。

Conclusion: 批评者端的形态条件化是一种实用且有效的跨形态泛化方法，能显著提升策略迁移性能与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Generalizing learned locomotion policies across quadrupedal robots with different morphologies remain a challenge. Policies trained on a single robot often break when deployed on embodiments with different mass distributions, kinematics, joint limits, or actuation constraints, forcing per robot retraining. We present MorFiC, a reinforcement learning approach for zero-shot cross-morphology locomotion using a single shared policy. MorFiC resolves a key failure mode in multi-morphology actor-critic training: a shared critic tends to average incompatible value targets across embodiments, yielding miscalibrated advantages. To address this, MorFiC conditions the critic via morphology-aware modulation driven by robot physical and control parameters, generating morphology-specific value estimates within a shared network. Trained with a single source robot with morphology randomization in simulation, MorFiC can transfer to unseen robots and surpasses morphology-conditioned PPO baselines by improving stable average speed and longest stable run on multiple targets, including speed gains of +16.1% on A1, ~2x on Cheetah, and ~5x on B1. We additionally show that MorFiC reduces the value-prediction error variance across morphologies and stabilizes the advantage estimates, demonstrating that the improved value-function calibration corresponds to a stronger transfer performance. Finally, we demonstrate zero-shot deployment on two Unitree Go1 and Go2 robots without fine-tuning, indicating that critic-side conditioning is a practical approach for cross-morphology generalization.

</details>


### [656] [SmallSatSim: A High-Fidelity Simulation and Training Toolkit for Microgravity Robotic Close Proximity Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14598)
*David Schwartz,Alexander Hansson,Sabrina Bodmer,David Sternberg,Oliver Jia-Richards,Keenan Albee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文介绍了SmallSatSim，一个基于MuJoCo的高保真小卫星微重力交会与近距操作（RPO）仿真工具包，支持自由飞行器控制、GPU加速仿真、故障建模与安全策略评估，旨在加速自主敏捷小卫星机器人操作研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微重力环境下机器人控制与规划算法面临新挑战（如自由漂浮操作、故障下规划、翻滚目标高精度动力学估计），亟需高保真仿真平台支撑新型RPO算法研发与测试。

Method: 构建基于MuJoCo物理引擎的SmallSatSim仿真工具包，集成先进自由飞控技术；采用MuJoCo MJX与JAX实现GPU加速采样与学习型仿真；支持可配置故障模型、可视化、日志记录与GPU并行化。

Result: 实现了高保真微重力RPO仿真框架，具备扰动建模、故障注入、实时控制与大规模并行仿真能力，并成功应用于机器人RPO规划与控制验证。

Conclusion: SmallSatSim作为开源工具包，显著提升了RPO算法开发与测试效率，为在轨装配制造、空间碎片清除及小天体探测等任务提供关键仿真支撑。

Abstract: Microgravity rendezvous and close proximity operations (RPO) is a growing area of interest for applications spanning in-space assembly and manufacturing (ISAM), orbital debris remediation, and small body exploration. Microgravity environments present unique challenges for robotic control and planning algorithms for new agile RPO mission scenarios like free-floating manipulation, planning under failure, and estimating high-fidelity dynamics of tumbling bodies. To facilitate the development and testing of novel RPO algorithms, we introduce SmallSatSim, a high-fidelity simulation toolkit that leverages the MuJoCo physics engine to accurately model small satellite RPO dynamics in local microgravity robotic free-flight settings, including under model disturbances and perturbations. The framework includes cutting edge out-of-the-box free-flyer control techniques. A GPU-accelerated pipeline using MuJoCo MJX and JAX is implemented for sampling- and learning-based simulation uses cases. SmallSatSim also supports configurable failure models, enabling the evaluation of safe control strategies under adversarial conditions. Visualization, logging, and GPU-enabled parallelization further enhance SmallSatSim's capability for RPO testing. We outline SmallSatSim's features and intended use cases, and demonstrate its use for robotic RPO planning and control. The open-sourced toolkit aims to accelerate research in autonomous, agile robotic small satellite operations.

</details>


### [657] [Latent Dynamics-Aware OOD Monitoring for Trajectory Prediction with Provable Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14603)
*Tongfei Guo,Lili Su*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）与累积最大均值差异（MMD）的快速变点检测方法，用于安全关键型网联自动驾驶系统中轨迹预测的分布外（OOD）事件监测，在保证理论可证延迟与误报率的前提下，提升了OOD检测的鲁棒性与实时性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在安全关键型CPS中，深度学习轨迹预测模型在真实部署中面对环境不确定性与罕见交通行为时可靠性下降，而现有OOD检测方法难以兼顾检测延迟、误报率的形式化保障与动态交通条件下的适应性。

Method: 将OOD监测建模为最快变点检测（QCD）问题；利用ID条件下预测误差演化可被HMM有效建模的观察，扩展累积MMD方法，无需已知变化后分布即可实现具备理论保证的检测。

Result: 在三个真实驾驶数据集上验证了该方法显著降低检测延迟，并对重尾误差和未知变化后条件具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 所提方法为轨迹预测的OOD监测提供了兼具统计严谨性与工程实用性的新范式，满足安全关键应用对形式化性能保证的需求。

Abstract: In safety-critical Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS), accurate trajectory prediction provides vital guidance for downstream planning and control, yet although deep learning models achieve high-fidelity forecasts on validation data, their reliability degrades under out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios caused by environmental uncertainty or rare traffic behaviors in real-world deployment; detecting such OOD events is challenging due to evolving traffic conditions and changing interaction patterns, while safety-critical applications demand formal guarantees on detection delay and false-alarm rates, motivating us-following recent work [1]-to formulate OOD monitoring for trajectory prediction as a quickest changepoint detection (QCD) problem that offers a principled statistical framework with established theory; we further observe that the real-world evolution of prediction errors under in-distribution (ID) conditions can be effectively modeled by a Hidden Markov Model (HMM), and by leveraging this structure we extend the cumulative Maximum Mean Discrepancy approach to enable detection without requiring explicit knowledge of the post-change distribution while still admitting provable guarantees on delay and false alarms, with experiments on three real-world driving datasets demonstrating reduced detection delay and robustness to heavy-tailed errors and unknown post-change conditions.

</details>


### [658] [Tactile Modality Fusion for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14604)
*Charlotte Morissette,Amin Abyaneh,Wei-Di Chang,Anas Houssaini,David Meger,Hsiu-Chin Lin,Jonathan Tremblay,Gregory Dudek*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了TacFiLM，一种轻量级的视觉-触觉信号融合方法，用于增强视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在接触密集型操作任务中的性能。该方法通过FiLM机制在后训练微调阶段将预训练的触觉表征调制中间视觉特征，无需大规模预训练或复杂token拼接，在插入任务中显著提升了成功率、执行效率与力稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型主要依赖视觉感知，难以捕捉接触丰富操作中的接触力、摩擦、柔顺性等关键物理信息；而现有触觉融合方法往往计算开销大、复杂度高，不适用于资源受限的行为模型。

Method: 提出TacFiLM：一种基于特征级线性调制（FiLM）的后训练微调策略，将预训练触觉编码器的表示用于条件化调节VLA模型中间视觉特征，实现轻量、高效、即插即用的多模态融合。

Result: 在插入任务上，TacFiLM显著提升成功率、直接插入性能、完成时间和力稳定性，且在分布内与分布外任务中均保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: TacFiLM是一种高效、轻量、实用的触觉-视觉融合方案，能有效增强VLA模型在接触密集型机器人操作中的表现，为多模态具身智能提供了新思路。

Abstract: We propose TacFiLM, a lightweight modality-fusion approach that integrates visual-tactile signals into vision-language-action (VLA) models. While recent advances in VLA models have introduced robot policies that are both generalizable and semantically grounded, these models mainly rely on vision-based perception. Vision alone, however, cannot capture the complex interaction dynamics that occur during contact-rich manipulation, including contact forces, surface friction, compliance, and shear. While recent attempts to integrate tactile signals into VLA models often increase complexity through token concatenation or large-scale pretraining, the heavy computational demands of behavioural models necessitate more lightweight fusion strategies. To address these challenges, TacFiLM outlines a post-training finetuning approach that conditions intermediate visual features on pretrained tactile representations using feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM). Experimental results on insertion tasks demonstrate consistent improvements in success rate, direct insertion performance, completion time, and force stability across both in-distribution and out-of-distribution tasks. Together, these results support our method as an effective approach to integrating tactile signals into VLA models, improving contact-rich manipulation behaviours.

</details>


### [659] [CyboRacket: A Perception-to-Action Framework for Humanoid Racket Sports](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14605)
*Peng Ren,Chuan Qi,Haoyang Ge,Qiyuan Su,Xuguo He,Cong Huang,Pei Chi,Jiang Zhao,Kai Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了CyboRacket框架，用于解决人形机器人在球拍类运动中动态球交互任务的感知-动作耦合难题，通过融合机载视觉感知、基于物理的轨迹预测和大规模预训练全身控制，实现了仅依赖机载传感器的实时视觉跟踪、轨迹预测与成功击球。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态球交互任务对机器人提出高要求，尤其在人形球拍运动中，需精准视觉追踪、轨迹预测、协调迈步与稳定全身击打；现有系统多依赖外部动捕或任务特定低层控制器，泛化性差。

Method: 提出分层感知-动作框架CyboRacket，集成机载摄像头视觉追踪、基于物理的球轨迹预测，并将预估拦截状态转化为末端执行器与基座运动指令，由SONIC控制器在Unitree G1人形机器人上实现全身执行。

Result: 在基于视觉的人形网球击球任务中验证了框架有效性，实现了实时视觉跟踪、轨迹预测及仅用机载传感的成功击球。

Conclusion: CyboRacket为具身智能体在动态、快速反应类任务中提供了可迁移、全自主的感知-动作闭环解决方案，显著降低了对外部设备与任务定制化控制的依赖。

Abstract: Dynamic ball-interaction tasks remain challenging for robots because they require tight perception-action coupling under limited reaction time. This challenge is especially pronounced in humanoid racket sports, where successful interception depends on accurate visual tracking, trajectory prediction, coordinated stepping, and stable whole-body striking. Existing robotic racket-sport systems often rely on external motion capture for state estimation or on task-specific low-level controllers that must be retrained across tasks and platforms. We present CyboRacket, a hierarchical perception-to-action framework for humanoid racket sports that integrates onboard visual perception, physics-based trajectory prediction, and large-scale pre-trained whole-body control. The framework uses onboard cameras to track the incoming object, predicts its future trajectory, and converts the estimated interception state into target end-effector and base-motion commands for whole-body execution by SONIC on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot. We evaluate the proposed framework in a vision-based humanoid tennis-hitting task. Experimental results demonstrate real-time visual tracking, trajectory prediction, and successful striking using purely onboard sensing.

</details>


### [660] [Physically Accurate Rigid-Body Dynamics in Particle-Based Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14634)
*Ava Abderezaei,Nataliya Nechyporenko,Joseph Miceli,Gilberto Briscoe-Martinez,Alessandro Roncone*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出PBD-R，一种改进的位置基动力学（PBD）公式，通过引入动量守恒约束和修正的速度更新，提升物理准确性，使其适用于机器人仿真，并设计了一个求解器无关的基准测试来评估其性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真器采用多子求解器拼接架构，难以进行统一物理推理；粒子型仿真器虽具统一性，但经典PBD因物理精度不足而难以用于机器人领域。

Method: 提出PBD-R新公式，包含动量守恒约束与修正速度更新机制；构建含解析解的求解器无关基准测试以定量评估物理精度。

Result: PBD-R在该基准上显著优于标准PBD，物理精度媲美MuJoCo，同时计算开销更低。

Conclusion: PBD-R在保持PBD高效与视觉合理性优势的同时，实现了满足机器人应用所需的物理保真度，为统一、高效且高保真的仿真提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Robotics demands simulation that can reason about the diversity of real-world physical interactions, from rigid to deformable objects and fluids. Current simulators address this by stitching together multiple subsolvers for different material types, resulting in a compositional architecture that complicates physical reasoning. Particle-based simulators offer a compelling alternative, representing all materials through a single unified formulation that enables seamless cross-material interactions. Among particle-based simulators, position-based dynamics (PBD) is a popular solver known for its computational efficiency and visual plausibility. However, its lack of physical accuracy has limited its adoption in robotics. To leverage the benefits of particle-based solvers while meeting the physical fidelity demands of robotics, we introduce PBD-R, a revised PBD formulation that enforces physically accurate rigid-body dynamics through a novel momentum-conservation constraint and a modified velocity update. Additionally, we introduce a solver-agnostic benchmark with analytical solutions to evaluate physical accuracy. Using this benchmark, we show that PBD-R significantly outperforms PBD and achieves competitive accuracy with MuJoCo while requiring less computation.

</details>


### [661] [Seeing Where to Deploy: Metric RGB-Based Traversability Analysis for Aerial-to-Ground Hidden Space Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14639)
*Seoyoung Lee,Shaekh Mohammad Shithil,Durgakant Pushp,Lantao Liu,Zhangyang Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于RGB图像的度量几何-语义重建与可通行性分析框架，用于空中无人机（UAV）向地面机器人（UGV）协同探测隐蔽空间（如涵洞）时的部署区域选择。通过多视角RGB重建、时序一致的语义分割及引入具身运动先验解决尺度模糊问题，生成置信度感知的几何-语义可通行图，并在真实 tethered UAV-UGV 平台上验证了部署区识别的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 涵洞等封闭基础设施的检测常需从高处入口进入内部，而空中-地面协同探测中，如何仅凭 aerial RGB 观测准确选择 UGV 部署区域，面临尺度模糊、重建不确定性与地形语义融合等挑战。

Method: 提出基于前馈多视角RGB重建的稠密几何生成主干网络；结合时序一致的语义分割构建3D语义地图；引入具身运动先验，利用预测相机运动与平台自运动一致性恢复度量尺度；进而构建置信度感知的几何-语义可通行性地图，并在显式可达性约束下评估候选部署区域。

Result: 在系留式UAV-UGV平台上实验验证了该框架能可靠识别隐蔽空间场景下的UGV部署区域，无需LiDAR即可实现度量级精度的重建与分析。

Conclusion: 该方法成功将纯RGB aerial观测转化为可用于UGV部署决策的度量几何-语义表示，为资源受限的空中-地面协同隐蔽空间探测提供了可行、轻量且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Inspection of confined infrastructure such as culverts often requires accessing hidden spaces whose entrances are reachable primarily from elevated viewpoints. Aerial-ground cooperation enables a UAV to deploy a compact UGV for interior exploration, but selecting a suitable deployment region from aerial observations requires metric terrain reasoning involving scale ambiguity, reconstruction uncertainty, and terrain semantics. We present a metric RGB-based geometric-semantic reconstruction and traversability analysis framework for aerial-to-ground hidden space inspection. A feed-forward multi-view RGB reconstruction backbone produces dense geometry, while temporally consistent semantic segmentation yields a 3D semantic map. To enable deployment-relevant measurements without LiDAR-based dense mapping, we introduce an embodied motion prior that recovers metric scale by enforcing consistency between predicted camera motion and onboard platform egomotion. From the metrically grounded reconstruction, we construct a confidence-aware geometric-semantic traversability map and evaluate candidate deployment zones under explicit reachability constraints. Experiments on a tethered UAV-UGV platform demonstrate reliable deployment-zone identification in hidden space scenarios.

</details>


### [662] [Coordinate-Independent Robot Model Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14656)
*Yanhao Yang,Ross L. Hatton*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种坐标无关的机器人模型辨识方法，通过利用系统黎曼度量诱导的对偶度量加权逆动力学残差，实现了物理上有意义的广义力归一化，从而消除了坐标选择带来的偏差，并在实验中验证了其在不同数据量下的优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于最小二乘的逆动力学辨识方法在坐标力空间中直接测量残差，因而依赖于所选坐标图、单位和缩放，存在坐标诱导偏差。

Method: 提出一种基于系统黎曼度量诱导的对偶度量加权逆动力学残差的坐标无关辨识方法；利用力-速度向量-余向量对偶性实现残差归一化；通过仿射度量与Schur补重构保持目标函数凸性，并支持物理一致性约束与几何正则化。

Result: 在惯性主导的Crazyflie-摆系统和阻力主导的LandSalp机器人上实验表明，该方法在低数据和高数据场景下均提升了辨识精度，尤其在形变坐标上效果显著。

Conclusion: 该坐标无关方法能消除坐标选择导致的偏差，提升模型辨识的物理一致性和精度，具有良好的泛化性与实用性。

Abstract: Robot model identification is commonly performed by least-squares regression on inverse dynamics, but existing formulations measure residuals directly in coordinate force space and therefore depend on the chosen coordinate chart, units, and scaling. This paper proposes a coordinate-independent identification method that weights inverse-dynamics residuals by the dual metric induced by the system Riemannian metric. Using the force--velocity vector--covector duality, the dual metric provides a physically meaningful normalization of generalized forces, pulling coordinate residuals back into the ambient mechanical space and eliminating coordinate-induced bias. The resulting objective remains convex through an affine-metric and Schur-complement reformulation, and is compatible with physical-consistency constraints and geometric regularization. Experiments on an inertia-dominated Crazyflie--pendulum system and a drag-dominated LandSalp robot show improved identification accuracy, especially on shape coordinates, in both low-data and high-data settings.

</details>


### [663] [A Dual Quaternion Framework for Collision Recovery of Quadrotor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14698)
*Valentin Gaucher,Wenlong Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于对偶四元数的SE(3)流形上的刚体碰撞重置映射，统一处理线性和角动量，在保证流形一致性的同时实现能量耗散型混合恢复控制，显著降低延迟与冲击误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统接触模型将线性与角冲量解耦，导致在快速状态跳变时出现流形不一致问题，影响无人机在复杂环境中的稳定性。

Method: 提出基于对偶四元数的SE(3)流形重置映射，以统一空间扭量（线+角速度）为变量；构建耦合线/角动量的混合恢复控制器，确保冲击过程严格能量耗散。

Result: 硬件在环测试显示执行延迟降低24%；MuJoCo仿真表明RMSE降低56.6%，峰值动能下降41.2%。

Conclusion: 该方法在保持理论严谨性（流形一致性、能量耗散）的同时，显著提升了实际冲击响应性能，适用于高动态无人机控制。

Abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) operating in cluttered environments require accurate impact modeling to maintain stability. However, conventional contact models decouple linear and angular impulses, risking manifold inconsistency during rapid state transitions. This article presents a dual quaternion reset map that resolves rigid-body impacts directly on the SE(3) manifold. By operating on the unified spatial twist (linear and angular velocities as a single dual entity), our formulation is algebraically equivalent to the classical Newton impulse model while preserving manifold consistency during discrete state jumps. Building on this framework, we design a hybrid recovery controller that couples linear and angular momentum to ensure strict energy dissipation across impacts. Hardware-in-the-loop benchmarks demonstrate a 24% reduction in execution latency compared to an optimized matrix-based implementation. High-fidelity MuJoCo simulations validate the controller's robustness to complex contact dynamics, showing a 56.6% reduction in post-impact root-mean-square error (RMSE) and a 41.2% decrease in peak kinetic energy compared to decoupled recovery methods.

</details>


### [664] [LiDAR-EVS: Enhance Extrapolated View Synthesis for 3D Gaussian Splatting with Pseudo-LiDAR Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14763)
*Yiming Huang,Xin Kang,Sipeng Zhang,Hongliang Ren,Weihua Zhang,Junjie Lai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LiDAR-EVS框架，通过伪外推视图点云监督和空间约束的dropout正则化，提升3D高斯泼溅在自动驾驶中对未见驾驶轨迹的激光雷达外推视图合成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS方法在单次扫描数据上训练，难以泛化到训练轨迹之外的新自车路径，导致激光雷达外推视图合成效果差。

Method: 提出LiDAR-EVS框架：(1) 结合多帧激光雷达融合、视图变换、遮挡卷曲与强度调整的伪外推视图点云监督；(2) 空间约束的dropout正则化以增强对多样化轨迹变化的鲁棒性。

Result: 在三个数据集上的外推视图激光雷达合成任务中达到SOTA性能。

Conclusion: LiDAR-EVS是一种轻量、即插即用的框架，可有效支持自动驾驶中的数据驱动仿真、闭环评估与合成数据生成。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a powerful technique for real-time LiDAR and camera synthesis in autonomous driving simulation. However, simulating LiDAR with 3DGS remains challenging for extrapolated views beyond the training trajectory, as existing methods are typically trained on single-traversal sensor scans, suffer from severe overfitting and poor generalization to novel ego-vehicle paths. To enable reliable simulation of LiDAR along unseen driving trajectories without external multi-pass data, we present LiDAR-EVS, a lightweight framework for robust extrapolated-view LiDAR simulation in autonomous driving. Designed to be plug-and-play, LiDAR-EVS readily extends to diverse LiDAR sensors and neural rendering baselines with minimal modification. Our framework comprises two key components: (1) pseudo extrapolated-view point cloud supervision with multi-frame LiDAR fusion, view transformation, occlusion curling, and intensity adjustment; (2) spatially-constrained dropout regularization that promotes robustness to diverse trajectory variations encountered in real-world driving. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiDAR-EVS achieves SOTA performance on extrapolated-view LiDAR synthesis across three datasets, making it a promising tool for data-driven simulation, closed-loop evaluation, and synthetic data generation in autonomous driving systems.

</details>


### [665] [CORAL: COntextual Reasoning And Local Planning in A Hierarchical VLM Framework for Underwater Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14786)
*Zhenqi Wu,Yuanjie Lu,Xuesu Xiao,Xiaomin Lin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出CORAL框架，通过解耦高层语义推理与底层反应式控制，提升自主水下机器人（AUV）在牡蛎礁监测任务中的语义导航性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AUV依赖几何导航，缺乏场景语义理解能力；而端到端视觉语言模型（VLM）驱动系统存在推理延迟高、无法建模机器人动力学、自校正能力弱三大问题，难以满足水下生态监测对安全、高效、鲁棒导航的需求。

Method: 提出CORAL框架：由VLM负责高层语义决策（如选择语义关键路点），动力学感知规划器执行底层无碰撞轨迹生成，几何验证模块实时校验路点并触发重规划。

Result: 相比此前最优方法，覆盖面积提升14.28个百分点（相对提升17.85%），碰撞数降为零，VLM调用次数减少57%。

Conclusion: 解耦式架构能有效融合VLM的语义理解能力与传统控制的可靠性，为复杂水下生态监测任务提供了更安全、高效、可扩展的智能导航新范式。

Abstract: Oyster reefs are critical ecosystem species that sustain biodiversity, filter water, and protect coastlines, yet they continue to decline globally. Restoring these ecosystems requires regular underwater monitoring to assess reef health, a task that remains costly, hazardous, and limited when performed by human divers. Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) offer a promising alternative, but existing AUVs rely on geometry-based navigation that cannot interpret scene semantics. Recent vision-language models (VLMs) enable semantic reasoning for intelligent exploration, but existing VLM-driven systems adopt an end-to-end paradigm, introducing three key limitations. First, these systems require the VLM to generate every navigation decision, forcing frequent waits for inference. Second, VLMs cannot model robot dynamics, causing collisions in cluttered environments. Third, limited self-correction allows small deviations to accumulate into large path errors. To address these limitations, we propose CORAL, a framework that decouples high-level semantic reasoning from low-level reactive control. The VLM provides high-level exploration guidance by selecting waypoints, while a dynamics-based planner handles low-level collision-free execution. A geometric verification module validates waypoints and triggers replanning when needed. Compared with the previous state-of-the-art, CORAL improves coverage by 14.28% percentage points, or 17.85% relatively, reduces collisions by 100%, and requires 57% fewer VLM calls.

</details>


### [666] [Exploring the dynamic properties and motion reproducibility of a small upper-body humanoid robot with 13-DOF pneumatic actuation for data-driven control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14787)
*Hiroshi Atsuta,Hisashi Ishihara,Minoru Asada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文开发了一款13自由度气动上身人形机器人，并基于其可重复动力学特性，设计了带显式时延补偿的多层感知机数据驱动控制器，在4自由度手臂子系统上验证了其轨迹跟踪性能优于传统PID控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 气动驱动的人形机器人在人机物理交互中潜力巨大，但其固有非线性使精确控制困难。

Method: 构建紧凑型13-DOF气动上身机器人；分析关键动态特性（如执行延迟）并验证系统可重复性；针对4-DOF手臂子系统，设计带显式时间延迟补偿的多层感知机数据驱动控制器，使用随机运动数据训练以生成压力指令。

Result: 所提数据驱动控制器在轨迹跟踪任务中性能优于传统PID控制器。

Conclusion: 数据驱动方法在高自由度、复杂气动机器人控制中具有显著潜力。

Abstract: Pneumatically-actuated anthropomorphic robots with high degrees of freedom (DOF) offer significant potential for physical human-robot interaction. However, precise control of pneumatic actuators is challenging due to their inherent nonlinearities. This paper presents the development of a compact 13-DOF upper-body humanoid robot. To assess the feasibility of an effective controller, we first investigate its key dynamic properties, such as actuation time delays, and confirm that the system exhibits highly reproducible behavior. Leveraging this reproducibility, we implement a preliminary data-driven controller for a 4-DOF arm subsystem based on a multilayer perceptron with explicit time delay compensation. The network was trained on random movement data to generate pressure commands for tracking arbitrary trajectories. Comparative evaluations with a traditional PID controller demonstrate superior trajectory tracking performance, highlighting the potential of data-driven approaches for controlling complex, high-DOF pneumatic robots.

</details>


### [667] [GraspALL: Adaptive Structural Compensation from Illumination Variation for Robotic Garment Grasping in Any Low-Light Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14789)
*Haifeng Zhong,Wenshuo Han,Zhouyu Wang,Runyang Feng,Fan Tang,Tong-Yee Lee,Zipei Fan,Ruihai Wu,Yuran Wang,Hao Dong,Hechang Chen,Hyung Jin Chang,Yixing Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出GraspALL模型，通过将光照变化编码为定量参考，指导RGB与非RGB模态的自适应特征融合，从而在不同光照条件下生成光照一致的抓取表示，显著提升服装抓取精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低光照下服装结构特征严重退化，导致抓取鲁棒性大幅下降；现有方法忽略不同光照下对非RGB特征依赖程度的变化，引入不匹配的非RGB线索，削弱模型对光照变化的适应能力。

Method: 提出GraspALL模型，创新性地将连续光照变化编码为定量参考，用于指导RGB与非RGB模态在不同光照强度下的自适应特征融合。

Result: 在自建服装抓取数据集上的实验表明，GraspALL在多种光照条件下相比基线方法抓取精度提升32-44%。

Conclusion: GraspALL通过光照-结构交互补偿机制，有效提升了服务机器人在全天候动态光照环境下的服装抓取性能。

Abstract: Achieving accurate garment grasping under dynamically changing illumination is crucial for all-day operation of service robots.However, the reduced illumination in low-light scenes severely degrades garment structural features, leading to a significant drop in grasping robustness.Existing methods typically enhance RGB features by exploiting the illumination-invariant properties of non-RGB modalities, yet they overlook the varying dependence on non-RGB features under varying lighting conditions, which can introduce misaligned non-RGB cues and thereby weaken the model's adaptability to illumination changes when utilizing multimodal information.To address this problem, we propose GraspALL, an illumination-structure interactive compensation model.The innovation of GraspALL lies in encoding continuous illumination changes into quantitative references to guide adaptive feature fusion between RGB and non-RGB modalities according to varying lighting intensities, thereby generating illumination-consistent grasping representations.Experiments on the self-built garment grasping dataset demonstrate that GraspALL improves grasping accuracy by 32-44% over baselines under diverse illumination conditions.

</details>


### [668] [A Unified Calibration Framework for Coordinate and Kinematic Parameters in Dual-Arm Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14809)
*Tianyu Huang,Bohan Yang,Bin Li,Wenpan Li,Haoang Li,Wenlong Li,Yun-Hui Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于李代数统一建模的双臂机器人视觉系统联合标定框架，同时优化坐标变换与运动学参数，通过POE公式构建无误差分离的整合误差模型，并推导闭式雅可比矩阵以保障参数可辨识性与优化稳定性；结合半定松弛的可认证初始化算法，显著提升了标定精度与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双机器人标定方法将运动学误差视为隐式噪声或单独建模，导致不可忽略的累积误差，难以实现高精度视觉协同。

Method: 提出基于李代数的统一标定框架，利用乘积指数（POE）公式构建整合误差模型，将坐标变换与运动学参数统一表示为旋量形式；推导基于李导数的解析雅可比矩阵，分析参数可辨识性；设计基于半定松弛的可认证初始化算法。

Result: 在相同视觉测量下，本方法标定精度显著优于现有基线方法；所提初始化算法在坐标估计任务中持续优于仅优化坐标的基线，验证了其作为联合优化初值的可靠性。

Conclusion: 该统一建模与可认证初始化策略有效缓解误差传播、保障优化良定性与收敛鲁棒性，为高精度双臂视觉协同提供了可靠标定基础。

Abstract: Precise collaboration in vision-based dual-arm robot systems requires accurate system calibration. Recent dual-robot calibration methods have achieved strong performance by simultaneously solving multiple coordinate transformations. However, these methods either treat kinematic errors as implicit noise or handle them through separated error modeling, resulting in non-negligible accumulated errors. In this paper, we present a novel framework for unified calibration of the coordinate transformations and kinematic parameters in both robot arms. Our key idea is to unify all the tightly coupled parameters within a single Lie-algebraic formulation. To this end, we construct a consolidated error model grounded in the product-of-exponentials formula, which naturally integrates the coordinate and kinematic parameters in twist forms. Our model introduces no artificial error separation and thus greatly mitigates the error propagation. In addition, we derive a closed-form analytical Jacobian from this model using Lie derivatives. By exploring the Jacobian rank property, we analyze the identifiability of all calibration parameters and show that our joint optimization is well-posed under mild conditions. This enables off-the-shelf iterative solvers to stably optimize these parameters on the manifold space. Besides, to ensure robust convergence of our joint optimization, we develop a certifiably correct algorithm for initializing the unknown coordinates. Relying on semidefinite relaxation, our algorithm can yield a reliable estimate whose near-global optimality can be verified a posteriori. Extensive experiments validate the superior accuracy of our approach over previous baselines under identical visual measurements. Meanwhile, our certifiable initialization consistently outperforms several coordinate-only baselines, proving its reliability as a starting point for joint optimization.

</details>


### [669] [Ego to World: Collaborative Spatial Reasoning in Embodied Systems via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14811)
*Heng Zhou,Li Kang,Yiran Qin,Xiufeng Song,Ao Yu,Zilu Zhang,Haoming Song,Kaixin Xu,Yuchen Fan,Dongzhan Zhou,Xiaohong Liu,Ruimao Zhang,Philip Torr,Lei Bai,Zhenfei Yin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Ego-to-World（E2W）基准和CoRL两阶段框架，旨在解决多智能体系统中从分布式、自我中心视角理解世界的问题。CoRL结合思维链监督微调与基于组相对策略优化的强化学习，并引入跨视图空间奖励（CVSR）提供密集任务对齐反馈，显著提升跨视图推理与感知定位能力，并在仿真与真实机器人任务中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统中每个智能体仅能通过受限的自我中心视角感知环境，存在遮挡和歧义问题，亟需一种能融合异构视角、实现世界中心式场景理解的方法。

Method: 提出Ego-to-World（E2W）基准（含全局计数、关系定位推理、动作导向抓取三任务），并设计CoRL两阶段框架：第一阶段为链式思维监督微调，第二阶段为基于Group-Relative Policy Optimization的强化学习；核心是Cross-View Spatial Reward（CVSR），将推理步骤与视觉证据对齐，保障跨视图实体一致性解析。

Result: CoRL在E2W基准上全面超越强闭源与开源基线，在推理与感知定位指标上均表现最优；消融实验证实CVSR各组件必要性；模型还能泛化至外部空间推理基准，并在真实多机器人系统中实现精准跨视图定位与抓取放置操作。

Conclusion: E2W基准与CoRL框架共同构建了从分布式自我中心观测中学习世界中心式场景理解的系统性方法，推动协作具身智能的发展。

Abstract: Understanding the world from distributed, partial viewpoints is a fundamental challenge for embodied multi-agent systems. Each agent perceives the environment through an ego-centric view that is often limited by occlusion and ambiguity. To study this problem, we introduce the Ego-to-World (E2W) benchmark, which evaluates a vision-language model's ability to fuse heterogeneous viewpoints across three tasks: (i) global counting, (ii) relational location reasoning, and (iii) action-oriented grasping that requires predicting view-specific image coordinates. To address this setting, we propose CoRL, a two-stage framework that combines Chain-of-Thought supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning using Group-Relative Policy Optimization. Its core component, the Cross-View Spatial Reward (CVSR), provides dense task-aligned feedback by linking reasoning steps to visual evidence, ensuring coherent cross-view entity resolution, and guiding the model toward correct final predictions. Experiments on E2W show that CoRL consistently surpasses strong proprietary and open-source baselines on both reasoning and perception-grounding metrics, while ablations further confirm the necessity of each CVSR component. Beyond that, CoRL generalizes to external spatial reasoning benchmarks and enables effective real-world multi-robot manipulation with calibrated multi-camera rigs, demonstrating cross-view localization and successful grasp-and-place execution. Together, E2W and CoRL provide a principled foundation for learning world-centric scene understanding from distributed, ego-centric observations, advancing collaborative embodied AI.

</details>


### [670] [Surgical Robot, Path Planning, Joint Space, Riemannian Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14852)
*Yoshiki Yamamoto,Maina Sogabe,Shunichi Hirahara,Toshiki Kaisaki,Tetsuro Miyazaki,Kenji Kawashima*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于黎曼流形的关节空间路径规划方法，以解决腹腔镜手术机器人因插入端口固定和腹腔表面非凸性导致的角度限制与计算开销问题；通过定义边代价函数并利用梯度下降，在关节空间中寻找运动范围更小的最优路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决腹腔镜手术机器人因固定插入端口导致的关节角度限制，以及腹腔表面非凸性带来的路径规划计算复杂度高问题。

Method: 将位置空间映射到黎曼流形，在关节空间中进行路径规划；定义边代价函数以约束关节运动范围，并利用梯度下降法搜索最优路径。

Result: 实验表明，该方法相比传统位置空间路径规划，显著减小了关节角度的运动范围。

Conclusion: 在关节空间结合黎曼几何建模与梯度优化，可更高效、更轻量地实现受限环境下的手术机器人路径规划。

Abstract: Robotic surgery for minimally invasive surgery can reduce the surgeon's workload by autonomously guiding robotic forceps. Movement of the robot is restricted around a fixed insertion port. The robot often encounters angle limitations during operation. Also, the surface of the abdominal cavity is non-concave, making it computationally expensive to find the desired path.In this work, to solve these problems, we propose a method for path planning in joint space by transforming the position into a Riemannian manifold. An edge cost function is defined to search for a desired path in the joint space and reduce the range of motion of the joints. We found that the organ is mostly non-concave, making it easy to find the optimal path using gradient descent method. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method reduces the range of joint angle movement compared to calculations in position space.

</details>


### [671] [ViSA: Visited-State Augmentation for Generalized Goal-Space Contrastive Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14887)
*Issa Nakamura,Tomoya Yamanokuchi,Yuki Kadokawa,Jia Qu,Shun Otsub,Ken Miyamoto,Shotaro Miwa,Takamitsu Matsubara*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ViSA（Visited-State Augmentation）方法，通过生成难访问状态的增强样本并学习一致嵌入空间，提升对比式强化学习（CRL）在目标空间上的泛化能力，从而更准确估计难以到达目标的价值函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CRL因将已访问状态作为伪目标，导致对未充分探索目标的价值函数估计不准确，限制了目标空间泛化能力。

Method: ViSA包含两部分：1）生成难访问状态的增强样本以扩充策略探索；2）基于互信息重构嵌入空间目标函数，利用增强状态作为辅助信息实现嵌入空间一致性正则化。

Result: 在仿真与真实机器人任务中验证了ViSA的有效性，显著提升了目标空间泛化能力，使模型能更准确估计难到达目标的价值函数。

Conclusion: ViSA通过数据增强与嵌入空间正则化有效缓解CRL的目标泛化瓶颈，为GCRL提供了更鲁棒、高效的价值估计框架。

Abstract: Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (GCRL) is a framework for learning a policy that can reach arbitrarily given goals. In particular, Contrastive Reinforcement Learning (CRL) provides a framework for policy updates using an approximation of the value function estimated via contrastive learning, achieving higher sample efficiency compared to conventional methods. However, since CRL treats the visited state as a pseudo-goal during learning, it can accurately estimate the value function only for limited goals. To address this issue, we propose a novel data augmentation approach for CRL called ViSA (Visited-State Augmentation). ViSA consists of two components: 1) generating augmented state samples, with the aim of augmenting hard-to-visit state samples during on-policy exploration, and 2) learning consistent embedding space, which uses an augmented state as auxiliary information to regularize the embedding space by reformulating the objective function of the embedding space based on mutual information. We evaluate ViSA in simulation and real-world robotic tasks and show improved goal-space generalization, which permits accurate value estimation for hard-to-visit goals. Further details can be found on the project page: \href{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage_ViSA/}{\texttt{https://issa-n.github.io/projectPage\_ViSA/}}

</details>


### [672] [From Folding Mechanics to Robotic Function: A Unified Modeling Framework for Compliant Origami](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14900)
*Bohan Zhang,Bo Wang,Huajiang Ouyang,Zhigang Wu,Haohao Bi,Jiawei Xu,Mingchao Liu,Weicheng Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于离散微分几何（DDG）的统一力学建模框架，整合面板弹性与折痕旋转，支持刚性折叠、弹性变形、多稳态及动态突跳等行为，推动可编程折纸机器人设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有折纸结构力学框架难以统一描述刚性折叠、弹性变形和稳定性驱动的相变；缺乏能兼顾几何一致性与多物理耦合的建模方法。

Method: 基于离散微分几何构建几何一致的变分模型，将折痕-面板耦合嵌入中边离散化，并引入隐式动力学公式以纳入重力、接触、摩擦与磁驱动等多物理效应。

Result: 实现了单折点分岔、Miura可展开膜、双稳态Waterbomb模块及Kresling爬行机器人的仿真与实验验证，展示了几何驱动力学对机器人功能的直接指导作用。

Conclusion: 离散微分几何可作为智能折纸机器人设计的基础语言，支撑预测建模、稳定性编程与力学引导的机器人驱动。

Abstract: Origami inspired architectures offer a powerful route toward lightweight, reconfigurable, and programmable robotic systems. Yet, a unified mechanics framework capable of seamlessly bridging rigid folding, elastic deformation, and stability driven transitions in compliant origami remains lacking. Here, we introduce a geometry consistent modeling framework based on discrete differential geometry (DDG) that unifies panel elasticity and crease rotation within a single variational formulation.
