</details>


### [972] [OpenExtract: Automated Data Extraction for Systematic Reviews in Health](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13338)
*Jim Achterberg,Bram Van Dijk,Jing Meng,Saif Ul Islam,Gregory Epiphaniou,Carsten Maple,Xuefei Ding,Theodoros N. Arvanitis,Simon Brouwer,Marcel Haas,Marco Spruit*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文介绍了OpenExtract，一个用于大规模系统性文献综述的开源自动化数据提取流水线，通过调用大语言模型（LLMs）从科学论文相关段落中预测数据条目，并在数字健康领域的系统性综述中验证其有效性，取得了>0.8的精确率和召回率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决大规模系统性文献综述中人工数据提取耗时费力、效率低下的问题，提升自动化水平。

Method: 构建名为OpenExtract的开源流水线，利用大语言模型（LLMs）对科学论文的相关文本段落进行数据条目预测，并在数字健康领域开展实证评估，与人工提取结果对比。

Result: OpenExtract在数字健康系统性综述任务中达到精确率和召回率均大于0.8，证明其具备高效、可靠的自动数据提取能力。

Conclusion: OpenExtract是一种有效、可复现且开源的自动化数据提取工具，适用于大规模系统性文献综述场景，有望显著提升科研效率。

Abstract: This study presents OpenExtract, an open-source pipeline for automated data extraction in large-scale systematic literature reviews. The pipeline queries large language models (LLMs) to predict data entries based on relevant sections of scientific articles. To test the efficacy of OpenExtract, we apply it to a systematic literature review in digital health and compare its outputs with those of human researchers. OpenExtract achieves precision and recall scores of > 0.8 in this task, indicating that it can be effective at extracting data automatically and efficiently. OpenExtract: https://github.com/JimAchterbergLUMC/OpenExtract.

</details>


### [973] [AMES: Approximate Multi-modal Enterprise Search via Late Interaction Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13537)
*Tony Joseph,Carlos Pareja,David Lopes Pegna,Abhishek Singh*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: AMES is a unified multimodal late interaction retrieval architecture that enables cross-modal search (text, image, video) in enterprise systems without backend changes, using shared embeddings and a two-stage search-re-ranking pipeline.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To enable fine-grained multimodal late interaction retrieval in production-grade enterprise search engines without requiring architectural redesign.

Method: AMES uses multi-vector encoders to embed text tokens, image patches, and video frames into a shared representation space; it applies a two-stage pipeline: parallel token-level ANN search with per-document Top-M MaxSim approximation, followed by accelerator-optimized Exact MaxSim re-ranking.

Result: AMES achieves competitive ranking performance on the ViDoRe V3 benchmark within a scalable, production-ready Solr-based system.

Conclusion: Fine-grained multimodal late interaction retrieval can be effectively deployed in real-world enterprise search systems without backend modifications.

Abstract: We present AMES (Approximate Multimodal Enterprise Search), a unified multimodal late interaction retrieval architecture which is backend agnostic. AMES demonstrates that fine-grained multimodal late interaction retrieval can be deployed within a production grade enterprise search engine without architectural redesign. Text tokens, image patches, and video frames are embedded into a shared representation space using multi-vector encoders, enabling cross-modal retrieval without modality specific retrieval logic. AMES employs a two-stage pipeline: parallel token level ANN search with per document Top-M MaxSim approximation, followed by accelerator optimized Exact MaxSim re-ranking. Experiments on the ViDoRe V3 benchmark show that AMES achieves competitive ranking performance within a scalable, production ready Solr based system.

</details>


### [974] [R3-REC: Reasoning-Driven Recommendation via Retrieval-Augmented LLMs over Multi-Granular Interest Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13730)
*Yuchen Miao,Mingxuan Cui,Yitong Zhu,Yu Wang,Siyang Xu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出R3-REC框架，通过多级用户意图推理、商品语义抽取、长短兴趣极性挖掘等模块，解决序列推荐中的证据不足和动态多维意图建模不透明问题，在多个数据集上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决序列推荐中两个长期存在的挑战：（i）证据不足——冷启动稀疏性与噪声大、长度变化的商品文本；（ii）对长/短期动态、多维用户意图建模不透明。

Method: 提出R3-REC（Reasoning-Retrieval-Recommendation），一种以提示为中心、检索增强的框架，整合多级用户意图推理、商品语义抽取、长短期兴趣极性挖掘、相似用户协同增强、基于推理的兴趣匹配与打分。

Result: 在ML-1M、Games和Bundle数据集上持续超越强神经网络和大语言模型基线，HR@1最高提升+10.2%，HR@5最高提升+6.4%，端到端延迟可控；消融实验验证各模块互补增益。

Conclusion: R3-REC有效缓解了序列推荐中的证据稀缺与意图建模黑箱问题，为融合检索增强与多粒度意图推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: This paper addresses two persistent challenges in sequential recommendation: (i) evidence insufficiency-cold-start sparsity together with noisy, length-varying item texts; and (ii) opaque modeling of dynamic, multi-faceted intents across long/short horizons. We propose R3-REC (Reasoning-Retrieval-Recommendation), a prompt-centric, retrieval-augmented framework that unifies Multi-level User Intent Reasoning, Item Semantic Extraction, Long-Short Interest Polarity Mining, Similar User Collaborative Enhancement, and Reasoning-based Interest Matching and Scoring. Across ML-1M, Games, and Bundle, R3-REC consistently surpasses strong neural and LLM baselines, yielding improvements up to +10.2% (HR@1) and +6.4% (HR@5) with manageable end-to-end latency. Ablations corroborate complementary gains of all modules.

</details>


### [975] [GreCon3: Mitigating High Resource Utilization of GreCon Algorithms for Boolean Matrix Factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13772)
*Petr Krajča,Martin Trnecka*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了GreCon3算法，作为GreCon和GreCon2的实质性改进版本，通过一种新型空间高效数据结构及增量初始化策略，显著提升了布尔矩阵分解（BMF）的计算效率与内存使用效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GreCon和GreCon2算法虽能提供高质量的因子分解，但存在高内存消耗和长运行时间的问题，限制了其在大规模数据上的应用。

Method: 提出GreCon3算法，引入新型空间高效数据结构以跟踪未处理数据，并设计增量初始化策略来减少内存占用、剔除无关数据；同时优化前几个因子的发现过程，提升整体性能。

Result: 实验表明GreCon3显著优于GreCon2，在计算效率和内存使用方面均有大幅提升，使得此前无法用GreCon处理的大规模数据集变得可行。

Conclusion: GreCon3推进了基于形式概念分析（FCA）的BMF研究前沿，为二元数据分析提供了更高效、可扩展的工具。

Abstract: Boolean matrix factorization (BMF) is a fundamental tool for analyzing binary data and discovering latent information hidden in the data. Formal Concept Analysis (FCA) provides us with an essential insight into BMF and the design of algorithms. Due to FCA, we have the GreCon and GreCon2 algorithms providing high-quality factorizations at the cost of high memory consumption and long running times. In this paper, we introduce GreCon3, a substantial revision of these algorithms, significantly improving both computational efficiency and memory usage. These improvements are achieved with a novel space-efficient data structure that tracks unprocessed data. Further, a novel strategy incrementally initializing this data structure is proposed. This strategy reduces memory consumption and omits data irrelevant to the remainder of the computation. Moreover, we show that the first factors can be discovered with less effort. Since the first factors tend to describe large portions of the data, this optimization, along with others, significantly contributes to the overall improvement of the algorithm's performance. An experimental evaluation shows that GreCon3 substantially outperforms its predecessor GreCon2. The proposed algorithm thus advances the state of the art in BMF based on FCA and enables efficient factorization of datasets previously infeasible for the GreCon algorithm.

</details>


### [976] [Retrieval-Feedback-Driven Distillation and Preference Alignment for Efficient LLM-based Query Expansion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13776)
*Minghan Li,Guodong Zhou*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种检索反馈驱动的蒸馏与偏好对齐框架，将大语言模型（如DeepSeek-685B）的查询扩展能力迁移到轻量学生模型（如Qwen3-4B），在显著降低推理开销的同时保持接近教师模型的检索效果（DL19上达97% nDCG@10），且在中英文数据集（MIRACL-zh等）上均有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型虽能生成高质量查询扩展，但其高推理成本难以直接部署于实际检索系统。

Method: 利用零样本和少样本提示下教师模型生成的两类扩展结果作为监督信号和偏好候选池；基于nDCG@10差异自动构建优选/拒选扩展对；采用直接偏好优化（DPO）对齐生成偏好与检索目标。

Result: Qwen3-4B学生模型在TREC DL19上达到DeepSeek-685B教师模型97%的nDCG@10性能，在MIRACL-zh中文基准上也保持有效性，显著降低推理成本。

Conclusion: 该框架实现了高效、实用的查询扩展模型压缩，在跨语言检索任务中具备强泛化性与落地价值。

Abstract: Large language models have recently enabled a generative paradigm for query expansion, but their high inference cost makes direct deployment difficult in practical retrieval systems. To address this issue, a retrieval-feedback-driven distillation and preference-alignment framework is proposed to transfer retrieval-friendly expansion behavior from a strong teacher model to a compact student model. Rather than relying on few-shot exemplars at inference time, the framework first leverages two complementary types of teacher-generated expansions, produced under zero-shot and few-shot prompting conditions, as supervision signals for distillation and as candidate pools for preference construction. A retrieval-metric-driven strategy is then introduced to automatically form chosen/rejected expansion pairs according to nDCG@10 differences, and Direct Preference Optimization is applied to explicitly align generation preferences with retrieval objectives. Experiments on TREC DL19/20/21 and MIRACL-zh show that the proposed approach preserves strong retrieval effectiveness while substantially reducing inference cost. In particular, the distilled Qwen3-4B model reaches about 97% of the teacher (DeepSeek-685B) model's nDCG@10 performance on DL19, and remains effective on the Chinese MIRACL-zh benchmark, demonstrating strong practicality across both English and Chinese retrieval settings.

</details>


### [977] [Iterative Semantic Reasoning from Individual to Group Interests for Generative Recommendation with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13934)
*Xiaofei Zhu,Jinfei Chen,Feiyang Yuan,Zhou Yang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种迭代语义推理框架（ISRF），利用大语言模型在显式个体兴趣与隐式群体兴趣之间进行三步语义推理，以提升生成式推荐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的推荐方法仅关注语义整合，而用户行为理论指出需进一步实现从显式个体兴趣到隐式群体兴趣的语义推理，才能真正理解用户兴趣。

Method: ISRF包含三个步骤：1）基于物品属性的多步双向推理构建语义交互图，刻画用户显式兴趣；2）基于语义物品特征生成用户特征，并构建相似性用户图以推断群体隐式兴趣；3）采用迭代批优化策略，使个体兴趣与群体兴趣相互引导、协同优化。

Result: 在Sports、Beauty和Toys数据集上的大量实验表明，ISRF显著优于当前最优基线方法。

Conclusion: ISRF通过显式-隐式兴趣间的迭代语义推理，实现了更准确、更全面的用户兴趣建模，提升了生成式推荐性能。

Abstract: Recommendation systems aim to learn user interests from historical behaviors and deliver relevant items. Recent methods leverage large language models (LLMs) to construct and integrate semantic representations of users and items for capturing user interests. However, user behavior theories suggest that truly understanding user interests requires not only semantic integration but also semantic reasoning from explicit individual interests to implicit group interests. To this end, we propose an Iterative Semantic Reasoning Framework (ISRF) for generative recommendation. ISRF leverages LLMs to bridge explicit individual interests and implicit group interests in three steps. First, we perform multi-step bidirectional reasoning over item attributes to infer semantic item features and build a semantic interaction graph capturing users' explicit interests. Second, we generate semantic user features based on the semantic item features and construct a similarity-based user graph to infer the implicit interests of similar user groups. Third, we adopt an iterative batch optimization strategy, where individual explicit interests directly guide the refinement of group implicit interests, while group implicit interests indirectly enhance individual modeling. This iterative process ensures consistent and progressive interest reasoning, enabling more accurate and comprehensive user interest learning. Extensive experiments on the Sports, Beauty, and Toys datasets demonstrate that ISRF outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/htired/ISRF.

</details>


### [978] [Location Aware Embedding for Geotargeting in Sponsored Search Advertising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13997)
*Jelena Gligorijevic,Djordje Gligorijevic,Aravindan Raghuveer,Mihajlo Grbovic,Zoran Obradovic*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于神经嵌入的框架，将用户查询与位置信息映射到同一低维空间，以提升移动搜索中的广告排序和查询-广告相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解并建模搜索查询的上下文（尤其是用户位置）对提升搜索相关性和商业化效果至关重要，尤其在移动设备上隐式位置查询日益增多。

Method: 构建一个简单而强大的神经嵌入框架，将用户查询和其位置（兴趣位置/物理位置）联合编码到共享低维语义空间中。

Result: 该表示能有效捕捉查询意图与位置间的细粒度交互，在广告排序和查询-广告相关性指标上优于无位置感知及传统位置感知方法。

Conclusion: 联合建模查询与位置的神经嵌入方法是提升移动端搜索体验与广告效果的有效途径。

Abstract: Web search has become an inevitable part of everyday life. Improving and monetizing web search has been a focus of major Internet players. Understanding the context of web search query is an important aspect of this task as it represents unobserved facts that add meaning to an otherwise incomplete query.The context of a query consists of user's location, local time, search history, behavioral segments, installed apps on their phone and so on. Queries that either explicitly use location context (eg: "best hotels in New York City") or implicitly refer to the user's physical location (e.g. "coffee shops near me") are becoming increasingly common on mobile devices. Understanding and representing the user's interest location and/or physical location is essential for providing a relevant user experience. In this study, we developed a simple and powerful neural embedding based framework to represent a user's query and their location in a single low-dimensional space. We show that this representation is able to capture the subtle interactions between the user's query intent and query/physical location, while improving the ad ranking and query-ad relevance scores over other location-unaware approaches and location-aware approaches.

</details>


### [979] [The Reasoning Bottleneck in Graph-RAG: Structured Prompting and Context Compression for Multi-Hop QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14045)
*Yasaman Zarinkia,Venkatesh Srinivasan,Alex Thomo*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文发现Graph-RAG系统虽能高效检索多跳答案，但推理能力不足导致准确率偏低；为此提出SPARQL链式思维提示和图遍历压缩两种增强方法，显著提升小模型性能并大幅降低成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Graph-RAG系统在多跳问答中检索能力强，但答案生成准确率低，大量错误源于推理失败，亟需提升下游LLM的推理能力与上下文利用效率。

Method: 提出两种增强方法：(i) SPARQL链式思维（CoT）提示，将问题分解为匹配知识图谱结构的三元组查询；(ii) 图遍历压缩，通过无LLM参与的知识图遍历压缩上下文约60%。同时引入问题类型路由机制。

Result: SPARQL CoT提升准确率2–14个百分点；图遍历压缩平均再增6个百分点；增强后的Llama-8B在三基准上匹敌甚至超越未增强的Llama-70B，成本降低约12倍；方法在LightRAG上验证具备跨系统迁移性。

Conclusion: 提升Graph-RAG效果的关键不仅在于检索，更在于适配图结构的推理提示与高效上下文压缩；轻量模型经针对性增强可实现高性能低成本的多跳问答。

Abstract: Graph-RAG systems achieve strong multi-hop question answering by indexing documents into knowledge graphs, but strong retrieval does not guarantee strong answers. Evaluating KET-RAG, a leading Graph-RAG system, on three multi-hop QA benchmarks (HotpotQA, MuSiQue, 2WikiMultiHopQA), we find that 77% to 91% of questions have the gold answer in the retrieved context, yet accuracy is only 35% to 78%, and 73% to 84% of errors are reasoning failures. We propose two augmentations: (i) SPARQL chain-of-thought prompting, which decomposes questions into triple-pattern queries aligned with the entity-relationship context, and (ii) graph-walk compression, which compresses the context by ~60% via knowledge-graph traversal with no LLM calls. SPARQL CoT improves accuracy by +2 to +14 pp; graph-walk compression adds +6 pp on average when paired with structured prompting on smaller models. Surprisingly, we show that, with question-type routing, a fully augmented budget open-weight Llama-8B model matches or exceeds the unaugmented Llama-70B baseline on all three benchmarks at ~12x lower cost. A replication on LightRAG confirms that our augmentations transfer across Graph-RAG systems.

</details>


### [980] [Citation-Enforced RAG for Fiscal Document Intelligence: Cited, Explainable Knowledge Retrieval in Tax Compliance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14170)
*Akhil Chandra Shanivendra*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多模态、强制引用的检索增强生成（RAG）框架，专为财政文档智能设计，强调可解释性与可审计性，通过源优先摄取、页面级溯源、生成时强制引用及证据不足时主动拒绝回答等机制，提升税务合规领域AI系统的可信度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式AI和RAG方法在高风险监管领域（如税务）中缺乏透明性、引用保真度和保守行为，难以满足合规分析与审计所需的可信要求。

Method: 提出一种多模态、引用强制的RAG框架：采用源优先文档摄取策略、保留页面级来源信息、在生成过程中强制引用原文、支持证据不足时主动 abstention（拒绝回答）。

Result: 在真实IRS及州级税务文档上的评测显示，该框架显著提升了引用保真度、降低了幻觉率，并生成了可供分析师直接使用的可解释结果。

Conclusion: 该框架为高风险财政监管场景提供了可解释、可审计、可信的AI解决方案，是迈向可信税务AI的重要路径。

Abstract: Tax authorities and public-sector financial agencies rely on large volumes of unstructured and semi-structured fiscal documents - including tax forms, instructions, publications, and jurisdiction-specific guidance - to support compliance analysis and audit workflows. While recent advances in generative AI and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) have shown promise for document-centric question answering, existing approaches often lack the transparency, citation fidelity, and conservative behaviour required in high-stakes regulatory domains. This paper presents a multimodal, citation-enforced RAG framework for fiscal document intelligence that prioritises explainability and auditability. The framework adopts a source-first ingestion strategy, preserves page-level provenance, enforces citations during generation, and supports abstention when evidence is insufficient. Evaluation on real IRS and state tax documents demonstrates improved citation fidelity, reduced hallucination, and analyst-usable explanations, illustrating a pathway toward trustworthy AI for tax compliance.

</details>


### [981] [Bringing Model Editing to Generative Recommendation in Cold-Start Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14259)
*Chenglei Shen,Teng Shi,Weijie Yu,Xiao Zhang,Jun Xu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出GenRecEdit，一种面向生成式推荐的模型编辑框架，旨在解决冷启动物品推荐准确率骤降的问题，通过无需重新训练的方式向生成式推荐模型注入新知识，显著提升冷启动性能并大幅减少更新开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式推荐模型在冷启动物品上表现极差（准确率接近零），而依赖重训练的现有方案受限于稀疏反馈、高计算成本和更新延迟，难以实用。受NLP中大模型免训练编辑技术启发，本文探索将其迁移到生成式推荐中。

Method: 提出GenRecEdit框架：1）显式建模序列上下文与下一词生成的关系；2）采用迭代式词元级编辑注入多词元物品表示；3）引入一对一触发机制降低多编辑间的干扰。

Result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，GenRecEdit显著提升冷启动物品的推荐性能，同时保持原有推荐质量，并仅需约9.5%的重训练时间。

Conclusion: GenRecEdit为生成式推荐提供了高效、低开销、免重训练的冷启动解决方案，推动了模型编辑技术在推荐系统中的落地应用。

Abstract: Generative recommendation (GR) has shown strong potential for sequential recommendation in an end-to-end generation paradigm. However, existing GR models suffer from severe cold-start collapse: their recommendation accuracy on cold-start items can drop to near zero. Current solutions typically rely on retraining with cold-start interactions, which is hindered by sparse feedback, high computational cost, and delayed updates, limiting practical utility in rapidly evolving recommendation catalogs. Inspired by model editing in NLP, which enables training-free knowledge injection into large language models, we explore how to bring this paradigm to generative recommendation. This, however, faces two key challenges: GR lacks the explicit subject-object binding common in natural language, making targeted edits difficult; and GR does not exhibit stable token co-occurrence patterns, making the injection of multi-token item representations unreliable. To address these challenges, we propose GenRecEdit, a model editing framework tailored for generative recommendation. GenRecEdit explicitly models the relationship between the full sequence context and next-token generation, adopts iterative token-level editing to inject multi-token item representations, and introduces a one-to-one trigger mechanism to reduce interference among multiple edits during inference. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that GenRecEdit substantially improves recommendation performance on cold-start items while preserving the model's original recommendation quality. Moreover, it achieves these gains using only about 9.5% of the training time required for retraining, enabling more efficient and frequent model updates.

</details>


### [982] [Learning Image-Text Matching with Optimal Partial Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14349)
*Zhengxin Pan,Haishuai Wang,Fangyu Wu,Bailing Zhang,Jiajun Bu,Hongyang Chen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于最优传输理论的跨模态匹配网络OMIT，利用Sinkhorn迭代和局部到全局相似性实现高效、精准的图像-文本细粒度匹配，并在Flickr30K和MS-COCO上验证了其优越性能与聚焦匹配特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨模态匹配方法难以兼顾高性能与高效率，且易受冗余或无关片段对齐干扰。

Method: 提出OMIT网络，基于最优传输理论，采用Cross-modal Mover's Distance度量细粒度图文片段相似性，结合Sinkhorn迭代实现高效近似，并引入部分匹配机制以抑制无关片段干扰。

Result: 在Flickr30K和MS-COCO两个标准图像-文本检索数据集上取得优越性能；可视化分析证实其具有聚焦匹配（focal matching）倾向。

Conclusion: OMIT在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了跨模态匹配精度，其理论基础扎实、结构设计合理，为高效细粒度跨模态对齐提供了新范式。

Abstract: Cross-modal matching, a fundamental task in bridging vision and language, has recently garnered substantial research interest. Despite the development of numerous methods aimed at quantifying the semantic relatedness between image-text pairs, these methods often fall short of achieving both outstanding performance and high efficiency. In this paper, we propose the crOss-Modal sInkhorn maTching (OMIT) network as an effective solution to effectively improving performance while maintaining efficiency. Rooted in the theoretical foundations of Optimal Transport, OMIT harnesses the capabilities of Cross-modal Mover's Distance to precisely compute the similarity between fine-grained visual and textual fragments, utilizing Sinkhorn iterations for efficient approximation. To further alleviate the issue of redundant alignments, we seamlessly integrate partial matching into OMIT, leveraging local-to-global similarities to eliminate the interference of irrelevant fragments. We conduct extensive evaluations of OMIT on two benchmark image-text retrieval datasets, namely Flickr30K and MS-COCO. The superior performance achieved by OMIT on both datasets unequivocally demonstrates its effectiveness in cross-modal matching. Furthermore, through comprehensive visualization analysis, we elucidate OMIT's inherent tendency towards focal matching, thereby shedding light on its efficacy. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/ppanzx/OMIT.

</details>


### [983] [A Systematic Comparison and Evaluation of Building Ontologies for Deploying Data-Driven Analytics in Smart Buildings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14374)
*Zhangcheng Qiang,Stuart Hands,Kerry Taylor,Subbu Sethuvenkatraman,Daniel Hugo,Pouya Ghiasnezhad Omran,Madhawa Perera,Armin Haller*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文系统比较评估了四种主流建筑本体（Brick Schema、RealEstateCore、Project Haystack 和 Google Digital Buildings），分别从本体公理设计（TBox）和实例数据表达（ABox）两个维度展开；结果表明各本体在紧凑性、完整性与表达力等方面各有优劣，不存在适用于所有场景的通用建筑本体，并进一步探讨了本体兼容性与设计模式以支持匹配与融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有建筑本体间存在语义差异，阻碍数据互操作性与实际复用。

Method: 采用SQuaRE-based OQuaRE框架进行TBox评估，并结合真实建筑数据开展ABox实证研究；同时分析本体兼容性与设计模式（ODPs）。

Result: TBox评估显示Project Haystack和Brick Schema更紧凑；ABox评估表明Brick Schema和RealEstateCore在概念覆盖与关系表达上更完整、更具表达力；无单一本体能普适于Linked Building Data集成。

Conclusion: 应依据具体应用场景选择或组合使用建筑本体，并借助设计模式促进本体对齐与融合。

Abstract: Ontologies play a critical role in data exchange, information integration, and knowledge sharing across diverse smart building applications. Yet, semantic differences between the prevailing building ontologies hamper their purpose of bringing data interoperability and restrict the ability to reuse building ontologies in real-world applications. In this paper, we propose and adopt a framework to conduct a systematic comparison and evaluation of four popular building ontologies (Brick Schema, RealEstateCore, Project Haystack and Google's Digital Buildings) from both axiomatic design and assertions in a use case, namely the Terminological Box (TBox) evaluation and the Assertion Box (ABox) evaluation. In the TBox evaluation, we use the SQuaRE-based Ontology Quality Evaluation (OQuaRE) Framework and concede that Project Haystack and Brick Schema are more compact with respect to the ontology axiomatic design. In the ABox evaluation, we apply an empirical study with sample building data that suggests that Brick Schema and RealEstateCore have greater completeness and expressiveness in capturing the main concepts and relations within the building domain. The results implicitly indicate that there is no universal building ontology for integrating Linked Building Data (LBD). We also discuss ontology compatibility and investigate building ontology design patterns (ODPs) to support ontology matching, alignment, and harmonisation.

</details>


### [984] [Open, to What End? A Capability-Theoretic Perspective on Open Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14584)
*Nicola Neophytou,Bhaskar Mitra*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文探讨了开放搜索运动面临的挑战，指出其可能重蹈开源和开放AI等运动的覆辙，被大公司收编或中和；主张以能力理论视角重新定义'开放'，强调开放应关注赋予用户何种能力，而非单纯公开源代码或数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型科技公司对搜索引擎的垄断引发担忧，尤其在地缘政治紧张和威权主义意识形态干预加剧的背景下，亟需反思开放搜索运动如何避免被权力结构收编。

Method: 采用概念分析与批判性理论方法，借鉴能力理论（capability approach），重新诠释'开放'的内涵，强调其应聚焦于系统向用户赋予的实际能力。

Result: 提出'能力导向的开放'新范式，揭示当前开放运动因忽视权力关系与能力分配而失效的风险，并为开放搜索提供更具抗共谋性的理论基础。

Conclusion: 开放搜索不能仅停留在技术层面的透明与共享，必须以增强多元主体实质性能力为目标，方能真正挑战平台霸权。

Abstract: The hegemony of control over our search platforms by a few large corporations raises justifiable concerns, particularly in light of emerging geopolitical tensions and growing instances of ideological imposition by authoritarian actors to manipulate public opinion. Recent movement for promote open search has emerged in response. This follows from past and ongoing push for openness to challenge corporate oligopolies (e.g., open source and open AI models) which have seen significant ongoing negotiations and renegotiations to establish standards around what constitutes being open. These tensions have hindered these movements from effectively challenging power, in turn allowing powerful corporations to neutralize or co-opt these movements to further entrench their dominance. We argue that the push for open search will inevitably encounter similar conflicts, and should foreground these tensions to safefguard against similar challenges as these adjacent movements. In particular, we argue that the concept of open should be understood not with respect to what is being made open but through a capability-theoretic lens, in terms of the capabilities it affords to the actors the system is being opened to.

</details>


### [985] [ResearchPilot: A Local-First Multi-Agent System for Literature Synthesis and Related Work Drafting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14629)
*Peng Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: ResearchPilot 是一个开源、可自托管的多智能体系统，用于辅助文献综述，支持从语义学者和 arXiv 检索论文、结构化提取摘要信息、跨论文模式合成及生成带引用的相关工作章节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为研究人员提供透明、可控、本地优先的文献综述辅助工具，弥补现有AI研究助手在可解释性、数据主权与系统可复现性方面的不足。

Method: 构建基于 FastAPI、Next.js、DSPy、SQLite 和 Qdrant 的多智能体系统，定义类型化智能体接口，实现本地持久化、历史检索与混合嵌入（远程或本地），支持用户自带模型密钥。

Result: 成功实现端到端可运行的 ResearchPilot 系统，通过自动化测试与本地全流程验证其功能完整性与工程可靠性。

Conclusion: ResearchPilot 是一项以系统设计为核心的贡献，强调工程实践、模块透明性与部署灵活性，而非算法创新；其局限性主要源于外部API限制、仅依赖摘要、文献覆盖不全及缺乏引用验证。

Abstract: ResearchPilot is an open-source, self-hostable multi-agent system for literature-review assistance. Given a natural-language research question, it retrieves papers from Semantic Scholar and arXiv, extracts structured findings from paper abstracts, synthesizes cross-paper patterns, and drafts a citation-aware related-work section. The system combines FastAPI, Next.js, DSPy, SQLite, and Qdrant in a local-first architecture that supports bring-your-own-key model access and remote-or-local embeddings. This paper describes the system design, typed agent interfaces, persistence and history-search mechanisms, and the engineering tradeoffs involved in building a transparent research assistant. Rather than claiming algorithmic novelty, we present ResearchPilot as a systems contribution and evaluate it through automated tests and end-to-end local runs. We discuss limitations including external API rate limits, abstract-only extraction, incomplete corpus coverage, and the lack of citation verification.

</details>


### [986] [Compute Allocation for Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14635)
*Sreeja Apparaju,Nilesh Gupta*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文研究了在推理密集型检索管道中如何分配计算资源，发现应将计算集中在重排序阶段而非均匀分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着智能体在长时序中运行，其记忆库持续增长，检索变得至关重要；许多查询需要推理密集型检索，即查询与相关文档之间的联系是隐含的，需要推理来弥合。

Method: 使用BRIGHT基准和Gemini 2.5模型系列，通过改变模型容量、推理时思考（inference-time thinking）以及查询扩展和重排序阶段的候选重排深度，分析计算分配效果。

Result: 重排序阶段显著受益于更强的模型（NDCG@10提升7.5）和更深的候选池（k从10增至100带来21%提升），而查询扩展在轻量模型之后收益递减（弱到强模型仅提升1.1 NDCG@10）；推理时思考在两个阶段均无明显增益。

Conclusion: 计算资源应集中用于重排序阶段，而非在管道各阶段均匀分配。

Abstract: As agents operate over long horizons, their memory stores grow continuously, making retrieval critical to accessing relevant information. Many agent queries require reasoning-intensive retrieval, where the connection between query and relevant documents is implicit and requires inference to bridge. LLM-augmented pipelines address this through query expansion and candidate re-ranking, but introduce significant inference costs. We study computation allocation in reasoning-intensive retrieval pipelines using the BRIGHT benchmark and Gemini 2.5 model family. We vary model capacity, inference-time thinking, and re-ranking depth across query expansion and re-ranking stages. We find that re-ranking benefits substantially from stronger models (+7.5 NDCG@10) and deeper candidate pools (+21% from $k$=10 to 100), while query expansion shows diminishing returns beyond lightweight models (+1.1 NDCG@10 from weak to strong). Inference-time thinking provides minimal improvement at either stage. These results suggest that compute should be concentrated on re-ranking rather than distributed uniformly across pipeline stages.

</details>


### [987] [Mitigating KG Quality Issues: A Robust Multi-Hop GraphRAG Retrieval Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14828)
*Yizhuo Ma,Shuang Liang,Rongzheng Wang,Jiakai,Qizhi Chen,Muquan Li,Ke Qin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: C2RAG is a framework for robust multi-hop reasoning over imperfect knowledge graphs, using constraint-based retrieval and sufficiency checks to reduce retrieval drift and hallucinations.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation suffers from retrieval drift and hallucinations due to imperfect knowledge graphs, which current methods often ignore.

Method: C2RAG introduces (1) constraint-based retrieval via atomic constraint triple decomposition and fine-grained anchoring to suppress drift, and (2) a sufficiency check to prevent hallucinations by deciding whether evidence supports structural propagation or triggers textual recovery.

Result: C2RAG outperforms latest baselines by 3.4% EM and 3.9% F1 on average across multi-hop benchmarks, with improved robustness under KG quality issues.

Conclusion: C2RAG effectively mitigates key limitations of RAG over imperfect KGs through principled constraint checking and sufficiency-aware retrieval.

Abstract: Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation enhances multi-hop reasoning but relies on imperfect knowledge graphs that frequently suffer from inherent quality issues. Current approaches often overlook these issues, consequently struggling with retrieval drift driven by spurious noise and retrieval hallucinations stemming from incomplete information. To address these challenges, we propose C2RAG (Constraint-Checked Retrieval-Augmented Generation), a framework aimed at robust multi-hop retrieval over the imperfect KG. First, C2RAG performs constraint-based retrieval by decomposing each query into atomic constraint triples, with using fine-grained constraint anchoring to filter candidates for suppressing retrieval drift. Second, C2RAG introduces a sufficiency check to explicitly prevent retrieval hallucinations by deciding whether the current evidence is sufficient to justify structural propagation, and activating textual recovery otherwise. Extensive experiments on multi-hop benchmarks demonstrate that C2RAG consistently outperforms the latest baselines by 3.4\% EM and 3.9\% F1 on average, while exhibiting improved robustness under KG issues.

</details>


### [988] [Multi-Scenario User Profile Construction via Recommendation Lists](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15357)
*Hui Zhang,Jiayu Liu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为RAPI的通用用户属性分析框架，通过利用易获取的推荐列表推断用户个人特征，结合BERT嵌入、样本增强和自适应加权分类，在四个数据集上实现了较高的用户特征推理准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升推荐系统中用户画像构建的准确性与实用性，特别是在不同信息条件下评估用户画像能力。

Method: 提出RAPI框架：1）构建代理推荐模型，利用预训练BERT获取物品嵌入；2）通过模型输出与物品嵌入相似性进行样本增强，扩展推荐列表；3）设计自适应权重分类模型动态加权以提升用户特征推理效果。

Result: 在四个数据集上的实验表明，RAPI分别达到0.764和0.6477的用户特征推理准确率。

Conclusion: RAPI是一种有效且实用的用户属性推断方法，能在仅依赖推荐列表的轻量级条件下实现较优的用户画像能力。

Abstract: Recommender systems (RS) play a core role in various domains, including business analytics, helping users and companies make appropriate decisions. To optimize service quality, related technologies focus on constructing user profiles by analyzing users' historical behavior information. This paper considers four analytical scenarios to evaluate user profiling capabilities under different information conditions. A generic user attribute analysis framework named RAPI is proposed, which infers users' personal characteristics by exploiting easily accessible recommendation lists. Specifically, a surrogate recommendation model is established to simulate the original model, leveraging content embedding from a pre-trained BERT model to obtain item embeddings. A sample augmentation module generates extended recommendation lists by considering similarity between model outputs and item embeddings. Finally, an adaptive weight classification model assigns dynamic weights to facilitate user characteristic inference. Experiments on four collections show that RAPI achieves inference accuracy of 0.764 and 0.6477, respectively.

</details>


### [989] [Financial Transaction Retrieval and Contextual Evidence for Knowledge-Grounded Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15459)
*Artem Sakhno,Daniil Tomilov,Yuliana Shakhvalieva,Inessa Fedorova,Daria Ruzanova,Omar Zoloev,Andrey Savchenko,Maksim Makarenko*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: FinTRACE is a retrieval-first architecture designed to enhance financial transaction analytics by converting raw transactions into reusable features, applying rule-based detectors, and storing behavioral signals in a knowledge base; it significantly improves low-supervision performance and enables LLM instruction tuning for state-of-the-art results.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: General-purpose LLMs perform poorly on time-distributed tabular financial data, and existing specialized models lack transferability and require labeled data.

Method: FinTRACE converts raw transactions into feature representations, applies rule-based detectors, stores behavioral signals in a graded behavioral knowledge base, and uses retrieved patterns to instruction-tune LLMs.

Result: FinTRACE doubles zero-shot MCC on churn prediction (0.19 → 0.38) and improves 16-shot MCC (0.25 → 0.40); it also enables LLMs to achieve state-of-the-art performance on transaction analytics via grounding with retrieved behavioral patterns.

Conclusion: FinTRACE bridges the gap between tabular financial data and LLM capabilities through a retrieval-augmented, knowledge-grounded architecture, enabling effective low-supervision and LLM-enhanced transaction analytics.

Abstract: Nowadays, success of financial organizations heavily depends on their ability to process digital traces generated by their clients, e.g., transaction histories, gathered from various sources to improve user modeling pipelines. As general-purpose LLMs struggle with time-distributed tabular data, production stacks still depend on specialized tabular and sequence models with limited transferability and need for labeled data. To address this, we introduce FinTRACE, a retrieval-first architecture that converts raw transactions into reusable feature representations, applies rule-based detectors, and stores the resulting signals in a behavioral knowledge base with graded associations to the objectives of downstream tasks. Across public and industrial benchmarks, FinTRACE substantially improves low-supervision transaction analytics, doubling zero-shot MCC on churn prediction performance from 0.19 to 0.38 and improving 16-shot MCC from 0.25 to 0.40. We further use FinTRACE to ground LLMs via instruction tuning on retrieved behavioral patterns, achieving state-of-the-art LLM results on transaction analytics problems.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [990] [Auditing Cascading Risks in Multi-Agent Systems via Semantic-Geometric Co-evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13325)
*Zixun Luo,Yuhang Fan,Hengyu Lin,Yufei Li,Youzhi Zhang*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于语义-几何协同演化的级联风险检测框架，利用Ollivier-Ricci曲率刻画多智能体系统通信拓扑中的信息冗余与瓶颈，实现对潜在不稳定性的早期预警和可解释的根因定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统审计方法仅关注单条消息语义，滞后且无法捕捉多智能体系统中早期出现但尚未显化的级联风险（如交互动态失真、隐性不稳定性放大）。

Method: 将多智能体交互建模为动态图，引入Ollivier-Ricci曲率（ORC）作为离散几何度量，联合语义流信号与图几何结构，学习可信协作的正常协同演化模式，并将偏离该耦合流形的行为视为早期预警信号。

Result: 实验表明，曲率异常可比显式语义违规提前数轮交互被检测到；局部Ricci曲率还支持可解释的根因归因，准确定位引发协作崩溃的关键智能体或连接。

Conclusion: 语义-几何协同演化建模能有效实现多智能体系统级联风险的前瞻性检测与可解释诊断，弥补了传统语义审计的滞后性缺陷。

Abstract: Large Language model (LLM)-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) are prone to cascading risks, where early-stage interactions remain semantically fluent and policy-compliant, yet the underlying interaction dynamics begin to distort in ways that amplify latent instability or misalignment. Traditional auditing methods that focus on per-message semantic content are inherently reactive and lagging, failing to capture these early structural precursors. In this paper, we propose a principled framework for cascading-risk detection grounded in semantic--geometric co-evolution. We model MAS interactions as dynamic graphs and introduce Ollivier--Ricci Curvature (ORC) -- a discrete geometric measure -- to characterize information redundancy and bottleneck formation in communication topologies. By coupling semantic flow signals with graph geometry, the framework learns the normal co-evolutionary dynamics of trusted collaboration and treats deviations from this coupled manifold as early-warning signals. Experiments on a suite of cascading-risk scenarios aligned with the risk category demonstrate that curvature anomalies systematically precede explicit semantic violations by several interaction turns, enabling proactive intervention. Furthermore, the local nature of Ricci curvature provides principled interpretability for root-cause attribution, identifying specific agents or links that precipitate the collapse of trustworthy collaboration.

</details>


### [991] [ClimateAgents: A Multi-Agent Research Assistant for Social-Climate Dynamics Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13840)
*Shan Shan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出ClimateAgents，一个用于社会-气候分析的多智能体研究助手，通过协作的领域专用AI智能体整合多模态数据、统计建模、文本分析与自动推理，支持假设生成、数据分析、证据检索和结构化报告，提升社会-气候系统研究的可解释性与适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统气候分析方法局限于单一指标，缺乏融合跨领域社会经济知识及适应动态研究问题的能力，难以应对社会行为与气候变化之间复杂的交互关系。

Method: 构建名为ClimateAgents的多智能体框架，包含协同工作的领域专用智能体，覆盖研究全流程（假设生成、数据获取与分析、证据检索、报告生成），整合联合国、世界银行等多源异构数据，并结合统计建模、文本分析与基于代理的推理。

Result: ClimateAgents成功支持了社会-气候关系的探索性分析与情景推演，验证了多智能体AI系统在增强可解释性、适应性和跨学科分析能力方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 多智能体AI系统可作为有力工具，弥补传统数据驱动模型在可解释性与灵活性上的不足，推动复杂社会-环境系统的研究向更综合、动态与人机协同的方向发展。

Abstract: The complex interaction between social behaviors and climate change requires more than traditional data-driven prediction; it demands interpretable and adaptive analytical frameworks capable of integrating heterogeneous sources of knowledge. This study introduces ClimateAgents, a multi-agent research assistant designed to support social-climate analysis through coordinated AI agents. Rather than focusing solely on predictive modeling, the framework assists researchers in exploring socio-environmental dynamics by integrating multimodal data retrieval, statistical modeling, textual analysis, and automated reasoning. Traditional approaches to climate analysis often address narrowly defined indicators and lack the flexibility to incorporate cross-domain socio-economic knowledge or adapt to evolving research questions. To address these limitations, ClimateAgents employs a set of collaborative, domain-specialized agents that collectively perform key stages of the research workflow, including hypothesis generation, data analysis, evidence retrieval, and structured reporting. The framework supports exploratory analysis and scenario investigation using datasets from sources such as the United Nations and the World Bank. By combining agent-based reasoning with quantitative analysis of socio-economic behavioral dynamics, ClimateAgents enables adaptive and interpretable exploration of relationships between climate indicators, social variables, and environmental outcomes. The results illustrate how multi-agent AI systems can augment analytical reasoning and facilitate interdisciplinary, data-driven investigation of complex socio-environmental systems.

</details>


### [992] [How do Role Models Shape Collective Morality? Exemplar-Driven Moral Learning in Multi-Agent Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13876)
*Junjie Liao,Huacong Tang,Zhou Ziheng,Yizhou Wang,Fangwei Zhong*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文通过基于大语言模型的多智能体模拟，研究角色模型如何影响集体道德形成，发现身份驱动的从众行为能显著覆盖个体初始倾向，促使价值观快速趋同。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究角色模型是否必要，以及它们如何塑造集体道德。

Method: 构建一个由大语言模型驱动的多智能体仿真系统，智能体具有多样化的内在驱动力（合作型到竞争型），并通过四阶段认知循环（计划-行动-观察-反思）互动与适应；设计四种实验博弈（对齐、崩溃、冲突、建设）并开展动机消融研究以识别模仿的关键驱动因素。

Result: 身份驱动的从众行为能强有力地覆盖智能体的初始倾向；智能体持续调整其价值观以匹配被感知为成功的榜样，导致价值观快速收敛。

Conclusion: 角色模型在塑造集体道德中起关键作用，尤其当榜样被赋予高身份价值时，其影响力可压倒个体原有倾向。

Abstract: Do We Need Role Models? How do Role Models Shape Collective Morality? To explore the questions, we build a multi-agent simulation powered by a Large Language Model, where agents with diverse intrinsic drives, ranging from cooperative to competitive, interact and adapt through a four-stage cognitive loop (plan-act-observe-reflect). We design four experimental games (Alignment, Collapse, Conflict, and Construction) and conduct motivational ablation studies to identify the key drivers of imitation. The results indicate that identity-driven conformity can powerfully override initial dispositions. Agents consistently adapt their values to align with a perceived successful exemplar, leading to rapid value convergence.

</details>


### [993] [Beyond Self-Interest: Modeling Social-Oriented Motivation for Human-like Multi-Agent Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13890)
*Jingzhe Lin,Ceyao Zhang,Yaodong Yang,Yizhou Wang,Song-Chun Zhu,Fangwei Zhong*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为自主社会价值导向代理（ASVO）的新框架，将大语言模型（LLM）与社会价值取向（SVO）理论结合，通过建模多维欲望系统和动态SVO计算，提升多智能体交互中行为的自然性与人类相似性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的多智能体方法缺乏对人类社会动机（如利他、竞争等）的建模能力，难以实现类人的社交互动。

Method: ASVO代理在每步中：1）感知环境与他人行为以更新信念；2）通过反思推理更新自身多维欲望值，并推断他人动机状态；3）基于自我满足与他人满足的对比，动态计算连续谱上的SVO值；4）据此选择兼顾欲望满足与社会对齐的行为。

Result: 在School、Workplace、Family三类场景实验中，ASVO在行为自然性和人类相似性上显著优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 结构化的欲望系统与自适应SVO漂移机制可有效支撑高保真度的多智能体社会仿真。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate significant potential for generating complex behaviors, yet most approaches lack mechanisms for modeling social motivation in human-like multi-agent interaction. We introduce Autonomous Social Value-Oriented agents (ASVO), where LLM-based agents integrate desire-driven autonomy with Social Value Orientation (SVO) theory. At each step, agents first update their beliefs by perceiving environmental changes and others' actions. These observations inform the value update process, where each agent updates multi-dimensional desire values through reflective reasoning and infers others' motivational states. By contrasting self-satisfaction derived from fulfilled desires against estimated others' satisfaction, agents dynamically compute their SVO along a spectrum from altruistic to competitive, which in turn guides activity selection to balance desire fulfillment with social alignment. Experiments across School, Workplace, and Family contexts demonstrate substantial improvements over baselines in behavioral naturalness and human-likeness. These findings show that structured desire systems and adaptive SVO drift enable realistic multi-agent social simulations.

</details>


### [994] [A Benchmark for Multi-Party Negotiation Games from Real Negotiation Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14066)
*Leo Benac,Jonas Raedler,Zilin Ma,Finale Doshi-Velez*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于多边协商的新型基准，强调序列化、约束性承诺下的决策，并通过多种价值函数近似方法分析不同博弈结构下的策略有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的多方谈判通常是分步达成约束性承诺，而非一次性决定最终结果，但该领域缺乏系统研究和基准。

Method: 构建了一个可配置的博弈生成器，覆盖激励一致性、目标复杂性和收益分配等关键结构属性；设计并比较了三种价值函数近似方法（短视奖励、乐观上界、悲观下界）；在小规模博弈上精确评估，在基于哈佛谈判挑战的大规模文档驱动实例上进行对比评估。

Result: 发现不同博弈结构显著影响各价值近似方法的表现，表明需根据结构选择或学习适配的估值策略；验证了长程规划与鲁棒状态值学习在约束性承诺和终端奖励设定下的必要性。

Conclusion: 多边协商建模需兼顾结构多样性与长期承诺约束，未来智能体应具备结构感知的价值学习与长时序规划能力。

Abstract: Many real-world multi-party negotiations unfold as sequences of binding, action-level commitments rather than a single final outcome. We introduce a benchmark for this under-studied regime featuring a configurable game generator that sweeps key structural properties such as incentive alignment, goal complexity, and payoff distribution. To evaluate decision-making, we test three value-function approximations - myopic reward, an optimistic upper bound, and a pessimistic lower bound - that act as biased lenses on deal evaluation. Through exact evaluation on small games and comparative evaluation on large, document-grounded instances derived from the Harvard Negotiation Challenge, we map the strategic regimes where each approximation succeeds or fails. We observe that different game structures demand different valuation strategies, motivating agents that learn robust state values and plan effectively over long horizons under binding commitments and terminal only rewards.

</details>


### [995] [Understanding Strategic Platform Entry and Seller Exploration: A Stackelberg Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14206)
*Garrett Seo,Xintong Wang,David C. Parkes*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个斯塔克尔伯格模型，研究在线平台（如Amazon、Apple）作为市场领导者决定何时进入并竞争第三方卖家产品的策略，通过理论分析和深度强化学习方法探讨了单个及多个卖家情形下的最优策略及其对创新和市场竞争的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线市场平台日益增强的经济影响力以及其自身进入第三方市场模仿成功产品的现象，引发了对平台进入策略及其对卖家创新激励影响的研究需求。

Method: 构建斯塔克尔伯格模型，理论分析单卖家情形下基于Gittins指数的探索-利用策略，并设计算法求解平台最优进入策略；针对多卖家情形，采用深度强化学习模拟卖家均衡行为。

Result: 在单卖家情形中，卖方最优策略可由Gittins指数刻画，平台最优进入策略可被有效计算；在多卖家情形中，Gittins指数失效，深度强化学习揭示了竞争与信息溢出对卖家行为的影响；结果与Amazon、Google Play等平台实证现象一致。

Conclusion: 平台进入策略显著影响卖家创新激励与市场竞争格局，研究为监管政策维护创新活力与市场多样性提供了理论依据与实证支持。

Abstract: Online market platforms play an increasingly powerful role in the economy. An empirical phenomenon is that platforms, such as Amazon, Apple, and DoorDash, also enter their own marketplaces, imitating successful products developed by third-party sellers. We formulate a Stackelberg model, where the platform acts as the leader by committing to an entry policy: when will it enter and compete on a product? We study this model through a theoretical and computational framework. We begin with a single seller, and consider different kinds of policies for entry. We characterize the seller's optimal explore-exploit strategy via a Gittins-index policy, and give an algorithm to compute the platform's optimal entry policy. We then consider multiple sellers, to account for competition and information spillover. Here, the Gittins-index characterization fails, and we employ deep reinforcement learning to examine seller equilibrium behavior. Our findings highlight the incentives that drive platform entry and seller innovation, consistent with empirical evidence from markets such as Amazon and Google Play, with implications for regulatory efforts to preserve innovation and market diversity.

</details>


### [996] [EcoFair-CH-MARL: Scalable Constrained Hierarchical Multi-Agent RL with Real-Time Emission Budgets and Fairness Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14625)
*Saad Alqithami*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出EcoFair-CH-MARL，一种带约束的分层多智能体强化学习框架，用于实现高效、可持续且公平的海运物流调度；其核心包括预算约束层、公平感知奖励变换器和双层策略架构，并在理论和实验上验证了其在减排、吞吐量与成本公平性上的显著优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球脱碳目标和日益严峻的市场压力要求海运物流方案兼顾效率、可持续性与公平性。

Method: 提出EcoFair-CH-MARL框架，包含：(i) 原始-对偶预算层以保证随机环境下的累计排放约束；(ii) 动态调度惩罚的公平感知奖励变换器以保障异构船队的成本公平性；(iii) 解耦战略路径规划与实时船舶控制的双层策略架构，支持智能体数量线性扩展；并给出O(√T)约束违反与公平损失的理论遗憾界。

Result: 在高保真海运数字孪生（16个港口、50艘船）及电网案例中，相比SOTA分层与约束MARL基线，实现最高15%减排、12%吞吐量提升、45%公平成本改善；公平性指标（Gini系数、min-max福利）优于专用公平MARL方法（如SOTO、FEN）；模块化设计兼容策略型与值函数型学习器。

Conclusion: EcoFair-CH-MARL推动了大规模、合规、社会责任导向的多智能体协同在安全关键领域的实际应用可行性。

Abstract: Global decarbonisation targets and tightening market pressures demand maritime logistics solutions that are simultaneously efficient, sustainable, and equitable. We introduce EcoFair-CH-MARL, a constrained hierarchical multi-agent reinforcement learning framework that unifies three innovations: (i) a primal-dual budget layer that provably bounds cumulative emissions under stochastic weather and demand; (ii) a fairness-aware reward transformer with dynamically scheduled penalties that enforces max-min cost equity across heterogeneous fleets; and (iii) a two-tier policy architecture that decouples strategic routing from real-time vessel control, enabling linear scaling in agent count. New theoretical results establish O(\sqrt{T}) regret for both constraint violations and fairness loss. Experiments on a high-fidelity maritime digital twin (16 ports, 50 vessels) driven by automatic identification system traces, plus an energy-grid case study, show up to 15% lower emissions, 12% higher through-put, and a 45% fair-cost improvement over state-of-the-art hierarchical and constrained MARL baselines. In addition, EcoFair-CH-MARL achieves stronger equity (lower Gini and higher min-max welfare) than fairness-specific MARL baselines (e.g., SOTO, FEN), and its modular design is compatible with both policy- and value-based learners. EcoFair-CH-MARL therefore advances the feasibility of large-scale, regulation-compliant, and socially responsible multi-agent coordination in safety-critical domains.

</details>


### [997] [Forecast-Aware Cooperative Planning on Temporal Graphs under Stochastic Adversarial Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14697)
*Manshi Limbu,Xuan Wang,Gregory J. Stein,Daigo Shishika,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向风险预测的多机器人协同规划框架，通过建模对手动态并预测边风险随时间演化，实现支持位置的前瞻性分配与路径联合规划，显著降低任务总期望代价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于支持协调的多机器人规划方法假设风险环境静态，无法应对由敌方巡逻或随机变化危险导致的风险时变性，限制了其在真实对抗环境中的有效性。

Method: 将敌方动态建模为图边上的一阶马尔可夫驻留-移动过程，据此推演边占用概率并生成时间索引的风险预测；在此基础上，在时序图上进行预测感知的支持位置分配与联合路径规划。

Result: 实验表明，该方法相比非前瞻性基线持续降低团队总期望代价，并逼近理想预言机（oracle）规划器的性能。

Conclusion: 引入风险预测能力可显著提升支持协调式多机器人系统的鲁棒性与效率，验证了预测感知规划在动态对抗环境中的关键作用。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-robot missions often require teams of robots to traverse environments where traversal risk evolves due to adversary patrols or shifting hazards with stochastic dynamics. While support coordination - where robots assist teammates in traversing risky regions - can significantly reduce mission costs, its effectiveness depends on the team's ability to anticipate future risk. Existing support-based frameworks assume static risk landscapes and therefore fail to account for predictable temporal trends in risk evolution. We propose a forecast-aware cooperative planning framework that integrates stochastic risk forecasting with anticipatory support allocation on temporal graphs. By modeling adversary dynamics as a first-order Markov stay-move process over graph edges, we propagate the resulting edge-occupancy probabilities forward in time to generate time-indexed edge-risk forecasts. These forecasts guide the proactive allocation of support positions to forecasted risky edges for effective support coordination, while also informing joint robot path planning. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach consistently reduces total expected team cost compared to non-anticipatory baselines, approaching the performance of an oracle planner.

</details>
